en.usage:
STORAGE
INFOSHEET
Hygienic hand rub specially formulated to dry
quickly, used as a complement to regular hand
washing.
Sanitizing hands after thorough hand washing
135 boxes; 9 layers per pallet
02858-028 / 1111761
Hygienic Hand Rub
6 pouches x 800ml
Eyes: In case of contact, immediately flush eyes with
plenty of water. Remove contact lenses and flush again.
Get medical attention if irritation persists.
Skin: Not applicable.
Inhalation: If inhaled, remove to fresh air.
Ingestion: Do not induce vomiting. Never give anything
by mouth to an unconscious person. If irritation persists,
get medical attention.
Keep out of reach of children. Keep container in a
cool, well-ventilated area. Keep container tightly
closed and sealed until ready for use. Avoid all
possible sources of ignition (spark or flame).Do not
store above the following temperature: 25°C.
Apply to hands after handwashing. Allow hands to
air dry.
KAY® QSR Hygienic Hand Rub
42201-00 KQSR 42201/8000/1010

STORAGE
INFOSHEET
Portioned controlled vegetable wash for
vegetables and fruit.
Desigend exclusively for produce washing. Effectively
removes dirt, soils, chemicals and other residue.
24 master cases with 12 boxes each;
6 layers per pallet
1054
Vegi Wash
100 packets x 1 oz (28.4g)
Eyes: In case of contact, immediately flush eyes with
plenty of water. Remove contact lenses and flush again.
Get medical attention if irritation persists.
Skin: In case of contact, immediately flush skin with
plenty of water.
Inhalation: If inhaled, remove to fresh air.
Ingestion: Do not induce vomiting. Never give anything
by mouth to an unconscious person. If irritation persists,
get medical attention.
Keep out of reach of children. Keep container in a
cool, well-ventilated area. Keep container tightly
closed. Store between the following temperatures:
0 and 50°C.
1. Fill produce washing sink with 38L lukewarm
water. Add 1 packet of Vegi Wash.
2. Submerge produce in solution for 5 minutes.
3. Rinse throughly under running potable water.
4. Let air dry.
KAY® Vegi Wash
42179-00 KQSR 42179/8000/1010

en.properties:
Stainless Steel Cleaner & Polish is spray cleaner for all metal surfaces.
Removes light soil, restores sheen to metal surfaces. Protective barrier keeps
out soil and moisture and makes cleaning easier. Leaves no messy residue.
Stainless Steel Cleaner & Polish loosens and removes light soil from all metal
surfaces. It leaves no residue after the surface is wiped dry. It rejuvenates the
appearance of your equipment and fixtures.
- Safe for use on all metal surfaces
Specially designed to clean stainless steel, Stainless Steel Cleaner & Polish
is safe for use on all metals including brass, copper and aluminum.
- Easy spay and wipe application
Simple spray on and wipe surface dry! Stainless Steel Cleaner & Polish
leaves an invisible protective barrier against soil and corrosion. Makes the next
clean up so much easier.
- Controlled usage avoids waste
A precision nozzle directs the spray only where it is aimed. Avoids the waste of
overspray, helps to control product usage.
en.usage:
Ready to use product, shake well before using.
Remove heavy soil from surfaces. Spray Stainless Steel Cleaner & Polish
onto dry stainless steel surface. Wipe with a dry cloth until shiny.
For emergency medical information call Ecolab: 001 1 651 222 5352

vi.properties:
Stainless Steel Cleaner & Polish là chất vệ sinh dạng xịt có thể dùng cho tất
cả các bề mặt kim loại. Loại bỏ vết bẩn nhẹ, phục hồi độ sáng bóng cho bề mặt
kim loại. Tạo lớp bảo vệ ngăn chặn vết bẩn và hơi ẩm; giúp việc làm sạch dễ
dàng hơn. Không để lại cặn bẩn.
Stainless Steel Cleaner & Polish làm mềm và loại bỏ vết bẩn nhẹ ra khỏi tất
cả bề mặt kim loại. Không để lại cặn sau khi bề mặt được lau khô. Giúp tái tạo
độ bóng bề mặt thiết bị và đồ đạc.
LỢI ÍCH
- An toàn khi sử dụng cho tất cả bề mặt kim loại
Được thiết kế đặc biệt cho inox, Stainless Steel Cleaner & Polish cũng đảm
bảo an toàn khi áp dụng cho đồng thau, đồng và nhôm.
- Thao tác xịt và lau dễ dàng
Chỉ cần xịt lên bề mặt và lau khô! Stainless Steel Cleaner & Polish tạo một
lớp vô hình lên bề mặt, bảo vệ bề mặt khỏi vết bẩn và trầy xước. Làm cho
việc vệ sinh lần sau dễ dàng hơn rất nhiều.
- Sử dụng có kiểm soát, tránh lãng phí
Đầu vòi xịt hướng thẳng chính xác vào vị trí cần đánh bóng. Tránh việc sử
dụng quá mức, giúp kiểm soát lượng dùng.
vi.usage:
Sản phẩm không cần pha loãng, lắc đều trước khi sử dụng.
Vệ sinh sạch vết bẩn nặng trên bề mặt. Xịt Stainless Steel Cleaner & Polish
lên bề mặt inox khô ráo. Lau bằng khăn khô tới khi sáng bóng.
Trong trường hợp khẩn cấp, hãy gọi Ecolab: 001 800 13 203 9987
Hãy yêu cầu tư vấn từ Đại diện Ecolab khi cần bất cứ thông tin gì về hướng dẫn sử dụng và thiết bị
bơm pha cần thiết. Về cảnh báo và thông tin sơ cứu, vui lòng xem Safety Data Sheet (SDS) hoặc nhãn
sản phẩm.

en.properties:
Glass Cleaner concentrate is formulated from plant-derived
surfactants to effectively remove tough soils including smoke and
grease films. Streak-free, fast-drying performance on windows, mirrors,
glass, plastic, acrylics and painted surfaces.
en.usage:
Use spray bottle labeled for this product only for mixing and dispensing
product.
1. Fill spray bottle with dilute solution.
2. Thoroughly wet the surface with product.
3. Allow a few minutes to work.
4. Wipe clean and dry with clean cloth, sponge or rag.
Light Duty:
31.21 ml/ 1 liter of water
(1:32)
Medium Duty:
46.7 ml/ 1 liter of water
(1:21)
Heavy Duty:
62.43 ml/ 1 liter of water
(1:16)
For emergency medical information call Ecolab: 001 1 651 222 5352

vi.properties:
Glass Cleaner là nước rửa kính cô đặc được pha chế từ các chất
hoạt động bề mặt có nguồn gốc thực vật để làm sạch hiệu quả các vết
bẩn nặng bao gồm khói và màng dầu mỡ. Hiệu suất khô nhanh, không
bị sọc trên cửa sổ, gương, kính, nhựa, acrylic và các bề mặt sơn.
vi.usage:
Chỉ sử dụng chai xịt được dán nhãn của sản phẩm này để chứa đựng
sản phẩm đã pha nước.
1. Châm đầy dung dịch đã pha loãng vào bình xịt.
2. Phun ướt kỹ bề mặt cần làm sạch bằng sản phẩm.
3. Chờ một vài phút để sản phẩm tác động làm sạch vết bẩn.
4. Lau sạch lại hay lau khô bằng vải sạch, miếng bọt biển hoặc giẻ.
Vết bẩn nhẹ:
31.21 ml/ 1 lít nước
(1:32)
Vết bẩn vừa:
46.70 ml/ 1 lít nước
(1:21)
Vết bẩn nặng:
62.43 ml/ 1 lít nước
(1:16)
Để biết thông tin trở giúp y tế khẩn cấp, hãy gọi Ecolab: 001 800 13 203 9987
Tham khảo ý kiến Đại diện Ecolab của bạn để biết hướng dẫn sử dụng cụ thể và thiết bị pha chế được
khuyến nghị. Để biết thông tin về cách cảnh báo và sơ cứu, vui lòng tham khảo Bảng dữ liệu an toàn
(SDS) hoặc nhãn sản phẩm.

en.properties:
Peroxide Multi-Surface Cleaner is a daily multi-purpose cleaner
concentrate formulated to clean windows, glass, countertops, glazed
porcelain, metal fixtures, walls, impervious floors, and other hard surface
materials.
Peroxide Multi-Surface Cleaner offers excellent cleaning and leaves a
streak-free shine. This product is Green Seal (GS-37) certified.
Peroxide Multi-Surface Cleaner is a USDA certified BioBased product
with a BioBased content of 89%. This product is not a sanitizer or
disinfectant.
en.usage:
For use with an approved Ecolab Oasis Dispenser – see your local
Ecolab Sales Representative for assistance. Do not mix with anything
except cold top water. Use only the bottle/sprayer recommended for
dispensing product.
1. Fill spray bottle/mop bucket with solution.
2. Thoroughly wet the surface with product. Allow a few minutes to work.
3. For hard surfaces: wipe clean and dry with clean cloth, sponge, or
mop. Rinse as needed.
For glass and windows: wipe dry with a clean cloth, paper towels,
wipers, or squeegee dry. Polish with clean side of cloth or another
cloth.
Light Duty:
7.8 ml/ 1 liter of water (1:128)
Medium Duty:
15.6 ml/1 liter of water (1:64)
Heavy Duty:
31.2 ml/1 liter of water (1:32)
For first time use on any surface, always test on hidden area.
For emergency medical information call Ecolab: 001 1 651 222 5352

vi.properties:
Peroxide Multi-Surface Cleaner là chất tẩy rửa đa năng đậm đặc dùng
hàng ngày được pha chế để làm sạch cửa sổ, kính, mặt bàn, đồ sứ
tráng men, đồ đạc kim loại, tường, sàn không thấm nước và các vật liệu
có bề mặt cứng khác.
Peroxide Multi-Surface Cleaner cung cấp khả năng làm sạch tuyệt vời
và để lại vẻ sáng bóng không bị sọc. Sản phẩm này được chứng nhận
Green Seal (GS-37).
Peroxide Multi-Surface Cleaner là sản phẩm BioBased được USDA
chứng nhận với hàm lượng BioBased là 89%.
vi.usage:
Chỉ sử dụng qua máy pha của Ecolab - hãy gặp Đại diện Bán hàng
Ecolab tại địa phương của bạn để được hỗ trợ. CHỈ được pha với nước
lạnh. Chỉ sử dụng chai / bình xịt được khuyến nghị để chứa sản phẩm.
1. Châm đầy dung dịch vào chai xịt / xô lau nhà.
2. Phun ướt kỹ bề mặt cần làm sạch bằng sản phẩm. Chờ một vài phút
để sản phẩm tác động làm sạch vết bẩn.
3. Đối với bề mặt cứng: lau sạch lại và làm khô bằng vải sạch, miếng
bọt biển hoặc giẻ lau nhà. Xả lại nước sạch khi cần thiết.
Đối với kính và cửa sổ: lau khô bằng vải sạch, khăn giấy,
cây gạt nước, hoặc cây lau kính. Đánh bóng bằng mặt vải sạch hoặc
dùng miếng vải khác
Vết bẩn nhẹ:
7.8 ml/ 1 lít nước (1:128)
Vết bẩn vừa:
15.6 ml/ 1 lít nước (1:64)
Vết bẩn nặng:
31.2 ml/1 lít nước (1:32)
Lần đầu tiên sử dụng trên bất kỳ bề mặt nào, luôn kiểm tra trên khu vực
góc khuất trước.
Để biết thông tin trở giúp y tế khẩn cấp, hãy gọi Ecolab: 001 800 13 203 9987
Tham khảo ý kiến Đại diện Ecolab của bạn để biết hướng dẫn sử dụng cụ thể và thiết bị pha chế được
khuyến nghị. Để biết thông tin về cách cảnh báo và sơ cứu, vui lòng tham khảo Bảng dữ liệu an toàn
(SDS) hoặc nhãn sản phẩm.

en.properties:
Medallion forms a long lasting protective coating that repels water,
prevents penetration of harmful liquids and retains its gloss indefinitely.
The metal cleaning paste contains high-grade waxes, fatty acids and
mineral oil as protective sub-stances and polishes gently.
- Stainless steel cleaner & polish
- Restores sheen to stainless steel
- Removes light soils from surfaces
- Sprays on and wipes off easily
en.usage:
Rub the product on to the surface with a cloth and then polish.
If surface is heavily soiled, first use Lime-A-Way for mineral soils or
Greasecutter for organic soils. Then spray “Medallion” on area to be
cleaned. Wipe off with a clean dry cloth until shiny, and ready to use.
It can be safely used on all metals including brass, copper, and chrome,
silver and bronze.
For emergency medical information call Ecolab: 001 1 651 222 5352

vi.properties:
Medallion tạo thành một lớp phủ bảo vệ lâu dài giúp chống nước, ngăn
chặn sự tác động có hại của các loại chất lỏng và giữ được độ bóng vô
thời hạn. Dung dịch làm sạch này có chứa loại sáp cap cấp, gốc axit béo
và dầu khoáng làm chất bảo vệ và đánh bóng nhẹ nhàng.
ÍCH LỢI
- Vệ sinh và làm bóng thép không gỉ
- Phục hồi độ sáng bóng cho thép không gỉ
- Loại bỏ vết bẩn ra khỏi bề mặt
- Xịt và lau sạch một cách dễ dàng
vi.usage:
Lau sản phẩm lên bề mặt bằng vải sau đó đánh bóng.
Nếu trên bề mặt có vết bẩn nặng, trước tiên sử dụng Lime-A-Way để
làm sạch vết bẩn có gốc khoáng chất hoặc Greasecutter cho vết bẩn
gốc hữu cơ. Sau đó xịt “Medallion” trên khu vực cần làm sạch. Lau sạch
bằng vải khô cho đến khi sáng bóng và sẵng sàng để sử dụng.
Có thể sử dụng an toàn trên tất cả các bề mặt kim loại bao gồm đồng
thau, đồng đỏ và chrome, bạc và đồng đen.
Để biết thông tin y tế khẩn cấp, hãy gọi Ecolab: 001 800 13 203 9987
Tham khảo ý kiến Đại Diện của Ecolab để hướng dẫn sử dụng cụ thể và thiết bị pha chế được khuyến
nghị. Để biết thêm thông tin về cảnh báo và sơ cứu, tham khảo Bảng Dữ Liệu An Toàn Hóa chất (MSDS)
hoặc trên nhãn của sản phẩm.

en.properties:
Floordress T 500 maintains a high foaming level for better cleaning and
performance. Highly efficient and concentrated emulsifiers help to remove
fat and oil stain.
en.usage:
For normal cleaning: dilute Floordress T 500 with water at ratio of 1:20 to
1:30. Pour the diluted Floordress T 500 into the machine’s shampoo box.
Apply on the carpet until the foam builds and clean by using vacuum
machine.
For removal of heavy stain: dilute Floordress T 500 with water at ratio of
1:5. Pour the diluted Floordress T 500 into the machine’s shampoo box.
Apply on the carpet until the foam builds and clean by using vacuum
machine.
For emergency medical information call Ecolab: 001 1 651 222 5352

en.properties:
Neutral Bathroom Cleaner is a daily bathroom cleaner concentrate,
formulated to effectively remove soils from toilet bowls, urinals, and
shower walls and floors.
Neutral Bathroom Cleaner provides excellent cleaning through a plant-
derived surfactant. This product is Green Seal (GS-37) certified.
Neutral Bathroom Cleaner is a USDA certified biobased product with a
biobased content of 96%. This product is not a sanitizer or disinfectant.
en.usage:
Use spray bottle labeled for this product only for mixing and dispensing
product.
1. Fill spray bottle with dilute solution.
2. Thoroughly wet the surface with product. Allow a few minutes to
work.
3. Wipe clean and dry with clean cloth, sponge, or rag. Rinse as needed.
Light Duty:
32.21 ml/1 liter of water (1:32)
Medium Duty:
46.7 ml/1 liter of water (1:21)
Heavy Duty:
62.43 ml/1 liter of water (1:16)
For emergency medical information call Ecolab: 001 1 651 222 5352

vi.properties:
Neutral Bathroom Cleaner là dung dịch đậm đặc làm sạch phòng tắm
hàng ngày, được bào chế để loại bỏ hiệu quả các chất bẩn bám trên bồn
cầu, bồn tiểu, tường và sàn nhà tắm.
Neutral Bathroom Cleaner có khả năng làm sạch tuyệt vời thông qua
chất hoạt động bề mặt có nguồn gốc thực vật. Sản phẩm này được
chứng nhận Green Seal (GS-37).
Neutral Bathroom Cleaner là sản phẩm được chứng nhận bởi USDA
với hàm lượng biobased là 96%. Sản phẩm này không phải là chất diệt
khuẩn hoặc chất khử trùng.
vi.usage:
Chỉ sử dụng chai xịt được dán nhãn của sản phẩm này để chứa đựng
sản phẩm đã pha nước.
1. Châm đầy dung dịch đã pha loãng vào bình xịt.
2. Phun ướt kỹ bề mặt cần làm sạch bằng sản phẩm. Chờ một vài phút
để sản phẩm tác động làm sạch vết bẩn.
3. Lau sạch lại hay lau khô bằng vải sạch, miếng bọt biển hoặc giẻ.
Tráng lại với nước sạch nếu cần thiết.
Vết bẩn nhẹ:
32.21 ml/1 lít nước (1:32)
Vết bẩn vừa:
46.70 ml/1 lít nước (1:21)
Vết bẩn nặng:
62.43 ml/1 lít nước (1:16)
Để biết thông tin trở giúp y tế khẩn cấp, hãy gọi Ecolab: 001 800 13 203 9987
Tham khảo ý kiến Đại diện Ecolab của bạn để biết hướng dẫn sử dụng cụ thể và thiết bị pha chế được
khuyến nghị. Để biết thông tin về cách cảnh báo và sơ cứu, vui lòng tham khảo Bảng dữ liệu an toàn
(SDS) hoặc nhãn sản phẩm.

en.properties:
Revitalize™ Carpet Spotter is a breakthrough chemistry for taking out
most stains. Ideal for the “unknown” spots. Excellent on coffee, wine,
juice, food soil, ink, betadine, dirt stains, etc. May be used on all synthetic
and wool carpet types. Carpet & Rug Institute Certified as well as Wool
Safe and Safer Choice Certified.
en.usage:
Always test for colorfastness in an inconspicuous spot before use on wool
carpets.
1. Remove excess debris with spoon, spatula or towel.
2. Apply Revitalize Carpet Spotter lightly to the spot and let product
work for 1-2 minutes.
3. Cover spot with white terry cloth and tamp towel with spotting brush.
DO NOT USE BRUSH TO SCRUB CARPET.
4. Rotate cloth as cleaner and spot are absorbed and repeat tamping.
Let air dry.
For emergency medical information call Ecolab: 001 1 651 222 5352

en.properties:
Oasis Pro Morning Breeze Room Refresher is a heavy duty
institutional air freshener and deodorizer especially formulated with long-
lasting ingredients to provide odor control for hours when used as
directed under normal circumstances. Leaves rooms smelling clean and
refreshed as tested by leading housekeepers.
en.usage:
Dispense concentrates through an Oasis or Oasis Pro Dispenser into a
spray bottle, pump-up sprayer, or fogger such as the Ecolab Fogmaster
Jr.
- Use daily in a spray bottle for small areas.
- Use in a fogger or pump-up sprayer in large areas and as part of deep
cleaning procedures to remove tough malodors.
- Spray mist into corners and center of area to be treated to ensure
proper coverage.
- Thoroughly wash (and allow to dry) all spray bottles weekly to ensure
best product performance.
Mild Strength:
2 oz/gal (16 ml/L)
Medium Strength:
4 oz/gal (32 ml/L)
Heavy-Duty Strength:
6 oz/gal (48 ml/L)
Fragrance Description: Fresh aloe infused with a touch of garden herbs
and crisp green apple with a zesty splash of citrus.
For emergency medical information call Ecolab: 001 1 651 222 5352

vi.properties:
Oasis Pro Morning Breeze Room Refresher là một chất khử mùi và làm
trong lành không khí đậm đặc được chế tạo đặc biệt với các thành phần
tồn lưu lâu dài để kiểm soát mùi hôi trong nhiều giờ khi sử dụng theo chỉ
dẫn để khử mùi thông thường. Giúp căn phòng luôn thơm tho và sảng
khoái và hiệu quả đã được đội ngũ quản gia hàng đầu kiểm chứng.
Mô Tả Hương Thơm: Lô hội tươi được kết hợp với một chút thảo mộc
vườn và táo xanh giòn với một chút cam quýt.
vi.usage:
Pha nước khử mùi cô đặc thông qua máy pha Oasis Pro Dispenser vào
bình xịt tay, bình xịt bơm hơi hoặc máy phun sương Ecolab Fogmaster Jr.
- Sử dụng hàng ngày trong bình xịt cho các khu vực nhỏ.
- Sử dụng máy phun sương hoặc bình xịt bơm hơi ở những khu vực rộng
lớn trong quy trình làm sạch tổng vệ sinh để loại bỏ các mùi khó chịu.
- Phun sương vào các góc và tâm khu vực cần xử lý để đảm bảo phạm
vi thích hợp được hiệu quả.
- Rửa kỹ (và để khô) tất cả các chai xịt hàng tuần để đảm bảo hiệu suất
sử dụng sản phẩm tốt nhất.
Nồng độ nhẹ:
2 oz/gal (16 ml/L)
Nồng đồ vừa:
4 oz/gal (32 ml/L)
Nồng độ đậm đặc:
6 oz/gal (48 ml/L)
Để biết thông tin trở giúp y tế khẩn cấp, hãy gọi Ecolab: 001 800 13 203 9987

surfactants to provide exceptional cleaning throughout bathrooms.
Effectively removes dirt, soap scum, and hard water deposits. For use on
bathroom chrome, porcelain, vinyl, tile and fiberglass. This product is
Green Seal (GS-37) certified.
Acid Bathroom Cleaner is a USDA certified biobased product with a
biobased content of 92.0%. This product is not a sanitizer or disinfectant.
en.usage:
Use spray bottle labeled for this product only for mixing and dispensing
product.
1. Fill spray bottle with dilute solution.
2. Thoroughly wet the surface with product. Allow a few minutes to
work.
3. Wipe clean and dry with clean cloth, sponge, or rag. Rinse as
needed.

vi.properties:
Là dung dịch tẩy rửa phòng tắm đậm đặc có gốc axit được pha chế từ
các chất hoạt động bề mặt có nguồn gốc thực vật để cung cấp khả năng

Ecolab All Purpose Detergent 21 is a manual liquid detergent of neutral pH. Contain a
blend of surfactants that effectively remove oil, grease, protein, carbohydrate and other
food soil materials. Suitable for manual cleaning of all equipments, ﬂoors, walls and all
sensitive materials including soft metals and plastics.
Superior streak-free removal of greasy soils & sauces
Clean more with less chemical use with suds formula
All Purpose Cleaner without Corrosion
en.usage:

en.properties:
Floordress T 510 is an extremely low foam carpet cleaner, efficient and
concentrated emulsifiers which help remove fat and oil stains on carpet.
Pleasant scent and no hazard to carpet dyes. Suitable for all spray-
extraction machines.
en.usage:
For normal cleaning: dilute 25-50 ml of Floordress T 510 with water 1 L
(the mixed ratio depends on the stain). Put the diluted Floordress T 510
into the spray-extraction machine. Spray onto the carpet and leave for
10-15 minutes. Add clean water into the machine, clean horizontally and
vertically. Let air dry or use blower.
For removal of heavy stain: dilute 200 ml of Floordress T 510 with water
1 L. Pour the diluted Floordress T 510 into the spray-extraction machine.
Spray onto the carpet and leave for 10-15 minutes. Add clean water into the
machine, clean horizontally and vertically. Let air dry or use blower.
For emergency medical information call Ecolab: 001 1 651 222 5352

en.properties:

stubborn stains, soap scum build-ups, grease and numerous other tough cleaning jobs. Use

Excellent for tough cleaning jobs
Return sparking to surfaces
Mild abrasive, safe to surfaces
en.usage:
Apply Creamic directly on surface or on sponge, damp cloth or brush. Loosen soil with rubbing
action. Then wipe clean or rinse with clean water.

Lemon-Eze là một sản phẩm tuyệt vời để tẩy các vết bẩn nặng, tích tụ,

Được khuyến nghị chỉ sử dụng làm chất tẩy rửa trong bệnh viện, viện

tẩy.

en.properties:
AIM Urinal Ring Encounter With Screen contains odor counteractant -
neutralizes odors and leaves restrooms with a fresh, clean scent. Each
flush releases cleaning agents to inhibit deposit buildups and eliminate
odors. Keep urinals clean and fresh smelling. Ideal use in restroom for
hotels, office buildings, restaurants, schools, factories, health clubs,
sports facilities, healthcare facilities and other restroom applications.
AIM Urinal Ring Encounter With Screen is available prepackaged
inside a triangular screen. The plastic screen acts as a holding device
and prevents nonflushable waste from entering drains, eliminating costly
clogs while extending the use-life of the urinal ring.
- Last up to twelve weeks (with screen) or eight weeks (without screen)
in normal use condition
- Release cleaning agents and enzymes with every flush
- Contains no paradichlorobenzene, a suspected carcinogen, and zero
phosphates.
- Leaves restrooms with a fresh, clean scent for positive first impression
- Save money
- Save time and prevent deposit build up (less cleaning labor required)
- Safe for employees and the environment

release enzymes with every flush.

en.properties:
ECO-BRITE 150 Detergent is a peroxide bleaching powder detergent
that does not affect dry stuffs. It is one-short detergent and safe
to use on all kinds of fabrics. Additional bleaching are unnecessary,
with the consequent saving of time and expense. It safely whitens
and brightens both white and colored linens.
en.usage:
Washing time: 8-20 minutes, depending on soil levels.
FIRST AID:
1. If Inhaled:
Remove to fresh air.
2. If skin contact:
Flush with plenty of water. Seek medical attention.
3. If eyes contact: Immediately flush with plenty of water and Normal
saline solution until irritation has been reduced.
Seek medical attention if irritation or burns persists.
4. If swallowed:
Do not induce vomiting. Rinse mouth at once; then
drink 1 or 2 large glasses of water or milk.

en.properties:
BC 50 is an organic chlorine bleaching powder with excellent
disinfectant and bleaching properties. It contains stabilized organic
chlorine and complexion agents which help to release the chlorine
gradually to achieve maximum bleaching performance. Used for
eliminating yellowish, grayish and heavy stains, suitable to use
with automatic laundry machines. Use only with white fabric.
en.usage:
BC 50 can be added during the wash cycle or better during the first
rinse. When adding BC 50 the temperature should not be above 60
degree C.
For normal bleaching: use 2-3 grams of BC 50 per a kilogram of dry
fabric.
For heavy stains bleaching: use 3-6 grams of BC 50 per a kilogram
of dry fabric.
Remark: Do not use with color linens.
Please test before using by mixing 0.5-1 g. BC 50 per 100 ml. of water.
Drop this solution on the inside part of linens leave for 1 minute. If there
is not any color changing, so it can be used with this product.
For emergency medical information call Ecolab: 001 1 651 222 5352

en.properties:
Silex 400 is organic chlorine based, with excellent disinfectant and
bleaching properties. Contains stabilized organic chlorine and
complexing agents which help release the chloride gradually to achieve
maximum bleaching performance on white fabric. For use with only white
fabric.
en.usage:
Silex 400 can be added during the wash cycle or better during the first
rinse. When adding Silex 400 the temperature should not be above
60°C.
For normal bleaching:
Dilute 2-3 grams of Silex 400 per 1 kg. of dry fabric.
For heavy stains bleaching:
Dilute 3-6 grams of Silex 400 per 1 kg. dry of fabric.
Remark: Please test before using by mixing 0.5-1 g. Silex 400 per
100 ml. of water. Drop this solution on the inside part of linens leave for
1 minute. If there is not any color changing, so it can be used with this
product.
For emergency medical information call Ecolab: 001 1 651 222 5352

vi.properties:
Silex 400 có gốc clo hữu cơ, với đặc tính khử trùng và tẩy trắng tuyệt
vời. Chứa clo hữu cơ ổn định và các hợp chất phức tạp giúp giải phóng
phân tử clo dần dần để đạt được hiệu suất tẩy trắng tối đa trên vải trắng.
Chỉ sử dụng với vải trắng.
vi.usage:
Silex 400 có thể được thêm vào trong bước giặt hoặc tốt hơn là trong
bước xả đầu tiên. Khi thêm Silex 400 vào, nhiệt độ không được quá
60°C.
Để tẩy trắng thông thường:
Pha 2-3 grams Silex 400 cho 1 kg. đồ vải khô.
Để tẩy các vết bẩn nặng:
Pha 3-6 grams Silex 400 cho 1 kg. đồ vải khô.
Lưu ý: Cần phải kiểm tra trước khi sử dụng bằng cách trộn 0.5-1 g.
Silex 400 vào 100 ml nước. Nhỏ dung dịch này vào mặt trong của vải rồi
đợi trong 1 phút. Nếu không có thay đổi nào về màu, vải này có thể tẩy
được.

en.properties:
Eco-Star Sour is a concentrated clear violet liquid laundry sour. Using to
clean rust stain and remove the alkaline on linen and also adjust pH in
water to 6-7 in the final washing step.
en.usage:
Use only with Ecolab laundry dispensing systems.
Store at room temperature.
1. In the final rinse step, the electric signal of the machine has been sent
to the dispenser.
2. The Eco-Star Sour in the container has been feed to mix with pure
water; ratio for using
For Light Soils:
Use Eco-Star Sour 0.5-1.0 ml. per 1 kg. of dry
fabric.
For Medium Soils:
Use Eco-Star Sour 1.0-2.0 ml. per 1 kg of dry
fabric.
For Heavy Soils:
Use Eco-Star Sour 2.0 ml. or more per
1 kg. of dry fabric.
Our laundry specialist will make specific recommendations based on
individual laundry conditions.
For emergency medical information call Ecolab: 001 1 651 222 5352

vi.properties:
Eco-Star Sour là chất trung hòa kiềm đậm đặc. Có tác dụng tấy vết gì
sét và loại bỏ kiềm trên vải rồi điều chỉnh độ pH trong nước về 6-7 trong
bước giặt cuối.
vi.usage:
Chỉ sử dụng với Hệ Thống Bơm Định Lượng Nhà Giặt Ecolab.
Lưu trữ ở nhiệt độ phòng.
1. Trong bước xả cuối, tín hiệu từ máy giặt được gửi tới hệ thống bơm
định lượng.
2. Eco-Star Sour trong thùng chứa được bơm pha tự động vào lồng
giặt; theo tỉ lệ:
Vết Bẩn Nhẹ:
0.5-1.0ml. Eco-Star Sour cho 1 kg. đồ vải
khô.
Vết Bẩn Vừa:
1.0-2.0 ml. Eco-Star Sour cho 1 kg đồ vải
khô.
Vết Bẩn Nặng:
2.0 ml. Eco-Star Sour hoặc hơn cho
1 kg. đồ vải khô.
Chuyên gia nhà giặt của chúng tôi sẽ đưa ra các tư vấn cụ thể dựa vào
điều kiện thực tế tại từng nhà giặt.
Trong trường hợp khẩn cấp, hãy gọi Ecolab: 001 800 13 203 9987
Hãy yêu cầu tư vấn từ Đại diện Ecolab khi cần bất cứ thông tin gì về hướng dẫn sử dụng và thiết bị
bơm pha cần thiết. Về cảnh báo và thông tin sơ cứu, vui lòng xem Safety Data Sheet (SDS) hoặc nhãn
sản phẩm.

en.properties:
Ecosoft is a concentrated fabric softener for reducing static cling on
natural and synthetic fabrics, quickly to impart fluffiness, smoothness and
softness to fabric while making ironing and folding easier. Efficiently
speeds extraction and drying time. It features a floral fragrance that
provides a pleasant, fresh scent to the linen coming out of the washer
and to the work environment.
en.usage:
Store and use only at room temperature.
Usage: Use in the final rinse step.
Normal softness:
use 2-3 ml. of Ecosoft per 1 kg of dry linen
Medium softness:
use 3-4 ml. of Ecosoft per 1 kg of dry linen
High softness:
use 4-5 ml. of Ecosoft per 1 kg of dry linen
Ecosoft should be used in a properly designed wash formula, in
commercial or professional washer, to meet specific needs.
Recommendations may vary depending on soil types, fabrics, water
conditions, etc.
For emergency medical information call Ecolab: 001 1 651 222 5352

en.properties:
Eco-Star Builder C is a revolutionary non-phosphate liquid alkali builder
that boosts the performance of Eco-Star Detergents.
It efficiently adjusts pH so soils are easily dispersed and removed from
fabrics. Exclusive Ecolab technology combines to deliver superior
performance and cost-effective results. Features and water minerals on
to the linen. White linens come out white, colored linens come out bright.
Suitable to use with automatic laundry machines.
en.usage:
Use only with Ecolab laundry dispensing system.
Store Eco-Star Builder C at room temperature.
For Light Soils:
Use 3-4 ml. of Eco-Star Builder C per 1 kg. of dry weight fabric.
For Medium Soils:
Use 4-5 ml. of Eco-Star Builder C per 1 kg. of dry weight fabric.
For Heavy Soils:
Use 6 ml. (or more) of Eco-Star Builder C per 1 kg. of dry weight fabric.
For emergency medical information call Ecolab: 001 1 651 222 5352

vi.properties:
Eco-Star Builder C là dung dịch tạo độ kiềm không chứa phốt-phát
mang tính đột phá giúp tăng hiệu suất cho xà phòng giặt chính Eco-Star
Detergent.
Nó điều chỉnh hiệu quả độ pH làm cho các vết bẩn dễ dàng bị phân tán
và loại bỏ khỏi vải. Công nghệ độc quyền của Ecolab vừa mang lại hiệu
quả vượt trội vừa tiết kiệm chi phí. Loại bỏ khoáng chất trong nước.
Giúp đồ trắng trắng ra, đồ màu sáng sạch hơn. Thích hợp sử dụng với
máy giặt công nghiệp.
vi.usage:
Chỉ dùng với Hệ Thống Bơm Định Lượng Nhà Giặt Ecolab.
Lưu trữ Eco-Star Builder C ở nhiệt độ phòng.
Đồ Bẩn Nhẹ:
Sử dụng 3-4 ml. Eco-Star Builder C cho 1 kg. đồ vải khô.
Đồ Bẩn Vừa:
Sử dụng 4-5 ml. Eco-Star Builder C cho 1 kg. đồ vải khô.
Đồ Bẩn Nặng:
Sử dụng 6 ml. (hoặc hơn) Eco-Star Builder C cho 1 kg. đồ vải khô.
Trong trường hợp khẩn cấp, hãy gọi Ecolab: 001 800 13 203 9987
Hãy yêu cầu tư vấn từ Đại diện Ecolab khi cần bất cứ thông tin gì về hướng dẫn sử dụng và thiết bị
bơm pha cần thiết. Về cảnh báo và thông tin sơ cứu, vui lòng xem Safety Data Sheet (SDS) hoặc nhãn
sản phẩm.

en.properties:
Sericol is the highly concentrated liquid detergent and washing
intensifier with dispersing and emulsifying properties. Completely
neutral and therefore very suitable for washing of delicate textiles such
as silk and wool.
- Contains tensides that can remove extremely stubborn pigment, oil
and fat stain on tablecloths, kitchen uniforms, etc.
- Is used as additive to the normal washing process at lower as well as
high temperature regions
- Dissolves easily in water to speed up the washing process
en.usage:
Can be applied directly on fatty stains, cuffs and collars prior to washing
to achieve a perfect washing result. Ideal for pre-soaking blood-stained
cloth.
Use 0.4-2 ml / kg. of dry fabric (increase dosage for heavy stains).
Our laundry specialist will make specific recommendations based on
individual laundry conditions.
For emergency medical information call Ecolab: 001 1 651 222 5352

vi.properties:
Sericol là dung dịch đậm đặc và là chất tăng cường giặt với các đặc
tính phân tán và nhũ hóa chất bẩn. Hoàn toàn trung tính và do đó rất
thích hợp để giặt các loại vải mỏng như lụa và len.
LỢI ÍCH
-
Chứa các chất hoạt động bề mặt có thể loại bỏ các chất tạo màu,
vết dầu và mỡ cực kỳ bẩn trên khăn trải bàn, đồng phục bếp, v.v.
-
Được sử dụng làm chất hỗ trợ cho quá trình giặt bình thường ở
những cơ sở có nhiệt độ cao hoặc thấp.
-
Dễ dàng hòa tan trong nước để tăng tốc quá trình giặt
vi.usage:
Có thể sử dụng trực tiếp lên các vết bẩn gốc dầu, cổ tay và cổ áo trước
khi giặt để đạt được kết quả giặt hoàn hảo. Lý tưởng khi ngâm đồ vải bị
bẩn máu.
Dùng 0,4-2 ml / kg. đồ vải khô (tăng liều lượng đối với các vết bẩn
nặng).
Chuyên gia nhà giặt của chúng tôi sẽ đưa ra các tư vấn cụ thể dựa trên
các điều kiện thực tế tại từng nhà giặt.

sản phẩm.

Eco-Star Soft C is a concentrated fabric softener for reducing static cling
on natural and synthetic fabrics, quickly to impart fluffiness, smoothness

Eco-Star Soft C là chất xả vải đậm đặc làm giảm hiện tượng bám tĩnh
điện trên sợi tự nhiên và sợi tổng hợp, nhanh chóng mang lại sự mềm

Eco-Star Sour IC is a high concentrated sour designed to control pH,

Safe for use on chlorine-sensitive fabrics with colorfast stripes, prints,

water;

Eco-Star Detergent Plus is ultra-concentrated natural soap-based
product that lubricates cotton fibers so linen has a nice soft feel. It offers
superior performance for hospitality, diaper, healthcare, and shirt
laundries in soft water conditions. Combines the power of anionic and
nonionic surfactants for rapid penetration of soils and stains on synthetic
fibers. A high level of optical brighteners produces whiter whites, brighter

en.properties:
Clearly Soft Plus 640 is a premium long lasting liquid fabric softener. It
helps to prolong the fragrance on linen after drying with encapsulated
technology. When the fabric is handled the capsules rupture to release the
remaining perfume for a boost of perfume freshness. Maintains high
performance on softness for Low-temp wash processes.
en.usage:
Use only with Ecolab Laundry Dispensing System. Store and use at room
temperature. Use in the final rinsing step.
Usage: 2-5 ml. Clearly Soft Plus 640 per 1 kg. of dry linen.
For emergency medical information call Ecolab: 001 1 651 222 5352

vi.properties:
Clearly Soft Plus 640 là một loại nước xả vải cao cấp, giữ mùi lâu.
Có tác dụng kéo dài hương thơm trên vải sau khi được sấy khô với công
nghệ nang bọc. Khi vải được xả xong, các viên nang sẽ vỡ ra để giải phóng
mùi hương còn lại để tăng độ tươi mới của hương thơm trên vải. Duy trì độ
mềm cao trong công nghệ giặt Nhiệt độ-thấp.
vi.dilution:

en.properties:
Eco-Star Oxy-Brite 50 is concentrated oxygen bleach, efficient stain
removal at temperature 70-80 °C on all fabrics. It prolongs fabrics life by
minimizing tensile strength loss.
- Removes stains and preserves colors of chlorine-sensitive fabrics
- Provides safe, efficient stain removal on all washable fabrics,delivering
bright whites and vibrant colors
- Especially suites for chlorine-sensitive fabrics with colorfast strips,
prints patterns or trims
en.usage:
Use only with Ecolab laundry dispensing system.
Usage directions: 2-3.5 ml/kg. of linens.
Remark: If contact with color linens, please test before using by mixing
Eco-Star Oxy-Brite 50 1-2 ml. with 100 ml. of water. Drop this solution
on the inside part of linens leave for 1 minute. If there is not any color
changing, so it can be used with this product.
Our laundry specialist will make specific recommendations based on
individual laundry conditions.
For emergency medical information call Ecolab: 001 1 651 222 5352

vi.properties:
Eco-Star Oxy-Brite 50 là chất tẩy gốc oxy đậm đặc, hiệu quả tẩy vết
bẩn ở nhiệt độ 70-80°C cho tất cả loại vải. Hạn chế sự ăn mòn lên sức
căng sợi vải qua đó kéo dài tuổi thọ đồ vải.
LỢI ÍCH
- Tẩy vết bẩn và giữ bền màu cho các đồ vải nhạy cảm với clo.
- Giúp tẩy màu hiệu quả và an toàn trên tất cả đồ vải có thể giặt được;
đem lại màu sắc trắng sáng và sống động.
- Đặc biệt phù hợp với các loại vải nhạy cảm với clo như các loại đồ vải
không bền màu, có họa tiết in hay đính vật trang trí.
vi.dilution:
Lưu ý: Nếu sử dụng với đồ màu, hãy kiểm thử trước khi sử dụng bằng
cách pha 1-2ml Eco-Star Oxy-Brite 50 với 100ml. nước. Nhỏ dung dịch
đa pha vào mặt trong vải rồi chờ 1 phút. Nếu không có bất kì sự thay đổi
màu sắc nào thì có thể sử dụng sản phẩm này.
Chuyên gia giặt ủi chúng tôi sẽ đưa ra các tư vấn dựa vào các điều kiện
thực tế tại từng nhà giặt.

en.properties:
Prowash
Suitable for washing all classifications when used in conjunction with Ecolab
alkaline builders. Ideal for hospital and commercial linen supply plants.
Prowash contains a concentrated mobile blend of anionic and nonionic surfactants
specifically developed to compliment our range of alkalis for all continuous and
batch washing systems and washer extractors and also provides excellent wash
quality from 60°C, and on lightly soiled classifications, such as hotel guest clothing
and or, healthcare patient clothing does not require any additional alkali.
Equally effective on control and polyester/cotton blends.
Optical brightening system ensures excellent whiteness.
Provides effective removal of oily and greasy type soils.
PHYSICAL DATA
Appearance
: Liquid
Color
: Clear blue
Odor
: Faint odor
pH (100%)
: 12.00-12.50
Boiling Point
: 100 °C
Specific Gravity
: 1.090-1.120 (Water = 1)
Dispersion properties
: Easily dispersed in hot water and cold water.
Solubility
: Easily soluble in hot water and cold water.
en.usage:
Ideal for automatic liquid feed systems laundry detergents

Prowash will be dispensed to dilute with the water in washing machine
at ratio 4.0-6.5 ml. per 1 kg. of dry fabric and continue washing.
Prowash should be used in a properly designed wash formula, in
commercial or professional washer, to meet specific needs.

conditions, etc.
Consult your Ecolab Specialist for specific use directions.

en.properties:
Eco-Star Destainer is laundry chlorine bleach used for eliminating
yellowish, grayish and heavy stain. Suitable to use with automatic
laundry machines.
- Fast-bleaching action delivers consistently good results while
prolonging fabric life and saving labor and linen replacement costs
- Highly active, stabilized liquid starts working immediately, accelerating
bleaching action and reducing formula time
- Disperses rapidly, delivering quick, uniform bleaching action
throughout the load for consistent results
- Eliminates yellowing and graying, as well as pin holding caused by
powders dissolving too slowly
- Removes difficult stains effectively
en.usage:
Use rubber gloves when handling product.
Use only with Ecolab Laundry Dispensing System.
Store Eco-Star Destainer at room temperature.
Usage directions: use 3.5-6 ml. of Eco-Star Destainer per 1 kg. of dry
linen and it works very efficiently in water temperature 50-68 °C.
Remark: please test before using by mixing Eco-Star Destainer
0.5-1 ml. with 100 ml. of water. Drop this solution on the inside part of
linens leave for 1 minute. If there is not any color changing, so it can be
used with this product.
For emergency medical information call Ecolab: 001 1 651 222 5352

vi.properties:
Eco-Star Destainer là chất tẩy đồ giặt gốc clo được dùng để loại bỏ các
vết màu vàng, xám hoặc vết bẩn nặng. Sử dụng phù hợp cho máy giặt
công nghiệp.
LỢI ÍCH
- Tác động tẩy nhanh mang lại hiệu quả ổn định; làm tăng tuổi thọ đồ
vải, tiết kiệm nhân công và chi phí thay thế đồ vải.
- Là chất lỏng ổn định, hoạt tính tẩy cao, tác dụng ngay lập tức, tăng
tính tẩy trắng và giảm thời gian giặt.
- Thẩm thấu nhanh, mang lại tác động tức thời và đồng bộ chất lượng
tẩy cho toàn bộ kết quả mẻ giặt như nhau.
- Loại bỏ vết màu vàng và xám, cũng như vết ố sót lại do bột giặt hòa
tan quá chậm trên vải.
- Rất hiệu quả loại bỏ các vết bẩn nặng.

en.properties:
EC-Oxy-Brite is concentrated oxygen bleach, efficient stain removal at

tensile strength loss.

 Provides safe, efficient stain removal on all washable fabrics,
delivering bright whites and vibrant colors
 Especially suites for chlorine-sensitive fabrics with colorfast strips,
prints patterns or trims

Use only with Ecolab laundry dispensing system.
Usage directions: 2-3.5 ml/kg. of linens.

inside part of linens leave for 1 minute. If there is not any color changing,
so it can be used with this product.

individual laundry conditions.

en.properties:

en.usage:
It is a violation of Federal law to use this product
in a manner inconsistent with its labeling.
NOTE: This product degrades with age. Use a
chlorine test kit and increase dosage, as
necessary, to obtain the required level of
available chlorine.
SANITIZING NONPOROUS FOOD CONTACT EQUIPMENT
RINSE METHOD: A solution of 100 ppm available
chlorine may be used in the sanitizing solution if a
chlorine test kit is available. Solutions containing
an initial concentration of 100 ppm available
chlorine must be tested and adjusted periodically
to insure that the available chlorine does not drop
below 50 ppm. Prepare a 100 ppm sanitizing
solution by thoroughly mixing 0.12% v/v (1.2 mL
of XY-12 per 1 liter of water) / 0.14% w/v (1.4 g of
XY-12 per 1 liter of water). If no test kit is
available, prepare a sanitizing solution by mixing
0.23% v/v (2.3 mL of XY-12 per 1 liter of water) /
0.28% w/v (2.8 g of XY-12 per 1 liter of water) to
provide approximately 200 ppm available chlorine
by weight. At 100 ppm available chlorine, this
product is an effective sanitizer against Vibrio
cholerae, Escherichia coli O157:H7, Listeria
monocytogenes,
Salmonella
typhi
and
Staphylococcus aureus. Clean all surfaces with
proper detergent and rinse with water. Just prior
to use, rinse all surfaces thoroughly with the
sanitizing solution maintaining contact with the
sanitizer for at least 2 minutes. If solution contains
less
than
50
ppm
available
chlorine
as
determined by a suitable test kit, either discard
the
solution
or
add
sufficient
product
to
reestablish a 200 ppm residual. Allow equipment
to drain thoroughly. Do not rinse and do not soak
overnight.
SANITIZING POROUS FOOD CONTACT EQUIPMENTRINSE
METHOD: Prepare a 600 ppm solution by
thoroughly mixing 0.75% v/v (7.5 mL of XY-12 per
1 liter of water) / 0.9% w/v (9.0 g of XY-12 per 1
liter of water). Clean surfaces in the normal
manner. Rinse all surfaces thoroughly with the
600 ppm solution, maintaining contact for at least
2 minutes. Prior to using equipment, rinse all
surfaces with a 200 ppm available chlorine
solution 0.23% v/v (2.3 mL of XY-12 per 1 liter of
water) / 0.28% w/v (2.8 g of XY-12 per 1 liter of
water). Do not rinse and do not soak overnight.
BACTERIOPHAGE CONTROL: XY-12 will significantly
reduce the incidence of Streptococcus cremoris
and S. diacetilactis bacteriophage in cheese
manufacturing establishments by fogging at
concentrations of 600 ppm available chlorine.
Fogging should be used as a supplement to
acceptable manual cleaning and sanitizing of
room surfaces as described above.
surfaces and remove or carefully protect all food
products and packaging materials. Fog desired
areas using one quart per 1000 cu. ft. of room
area with an XY-12 solution containing 600 ppm of
available chlorine. Vacate the area of all
personnel for a minimum of 2 hours after fogging.
All food contact surfaces must then be thoroughly
rinsed with an XY-12 solution at 200 ppm of
available chlorine. Allow surfaces to drain
thoroughly before operations are resumed.
FOR CONTINUOUS TREATMENT OF MEAT AND POULTRY
OR FRUIT AND VEGETABLE CONVEYORS: Wash, rinse
and
sanitize
conveyor
equipment.
During
processing, apply XY-12 at a 200 ppm available
chlorine level to conveyors with MIKRO MASTER or
other suitable feeding equipment. Controlled
volumes of sanitizer are applied to the return
portion of conveyor through nozzles so located as
to permit maximum drainage of sanitizer from
equipment and to prevent puddles on top of belt.
During interruptions in operations, apply a coarse
spray to equipment, peelers, collators, slicers and
saws with MIKRO MASTER dispensed XY-12
solution of 200 ppm available chlorine. Conveyor
equipment must be free of product when applying
this
coarse
spray.
NOTE:
FOR
MECHANICAL
OPERATIONS, prepared use solutions may not be
reused for sanitizing but may be reused for other
purposes
such
as
cleaning.
FOR
MANUAL
OPERATIONS, fresh sanitizing solutions must be
prepared as soon as they become diluted or
soiled.
BOOSTER FOR ALKALINE DETERGENTS TO CLEAN FOOD
PROCESSING EQUIPMENT: XY-12 is an effective bleach
cleaning booster for use with alkaline detergents.
For cleaning applications as a detergent booster,
use 0.12-0.69% v/v (1.2-6.9 mL of XY-12 per 1
liter of water) / 0.14-0.83% w/v (1.4-8.3 g of XY-12
per 1 liter of water) (100-1000 ppm active
chlorine) to aid in the removal of organic soils. All
hard non-porous food contact surfaces treated
with this boosted detergent must be rinsed
thoroughly with a potable water rinse followed by
sanitizing with an approved food contact surface
sanitizer.
GLOVE DIP SANITIZER DIRECTIONS: To prevent cross
contamination from area to area in animal areas
and packaging and storage areas of food plants,
dip pre-washed (plastic, latex, or other synthetic
rubber) non-porous gloved hands into a suitable
clean container that contains enough freshly
made sanitizing solution to cover the gloved area.
Remove gross contamination from gloves before
sanitizing. Then place gloved hand in a use-
solution of 0.23% v/v (2.3 mL of XY-12 per 1 liter
of water) / 0.28% w/v (2.8 g of XY-12 per 1 liter of
HARD SURFACE SANITIZER
XY-12
water) to provide approximately 200 ppm available
chlorine by weight for 2 minutes. Change the
solution in the bath at least daily or more often if the
solution appears soiled or measures less than 200
ppm.
SANITIZING
HARD,
NON-POROUS
OUTSIDE
SURFACES OF AIRTIGHT, SEALED PACKAGES
CONTAINING FOOD OR NON-FOOD PRODUCTS
XY-12 may be used as a final sanitizing rinse for
hard, non-porous outside surfaces of airtight, sealed
packages containing food or non-food products.
Prepare sanitizing solution by thoroughly mixing
0.23% v/v (2.3 mL of XY-12 per 1 liter of water) /
0.28% w/v (2.8 g of XY-12 per 1 liter of water) to
provide approximately 200 ppm available chlorine
by weight. All surfaces must be exposed to the
sanitizing solution for a period of not less than 2
minutes. Drain thoroughly. No rinse necessary.
SANITIZATION
OF
NONPOROUS
NON-FOOD
CONTACT SURFACES RINSE METHOD: Prepare
sanitizing solution by thoroughly mixing 0.23% v/v
(2.3 mL of XY-12 per 1 liter of water) / 0.28% w/v
(2.8 g of XY-12 per 1 liter of water) to provide
approximately 200 ppm available chlorine by
weight. Clean surfaces such as floors and walls in
the normal manner. Rinse all surfaces thoroughly
with the sanitizing solution, maintaining contact with
the sanitizer for at least 2 minutes. Do not rinse with
water after treatment.
TREATMENT OF POTABLE WATER IN MEAT
PROCESSING PLANTS: For processing water in
meat plants, use chlorine level up to 5 ppm
available chlorine 0.005% v/v (0.05 mL of XY-12 per
1 liter of water) / 0.006% w/v (0.06 g of XY-12 per 1
liter of water) and for processing water in poultry
plants, use chlorine level up to 20 ppm available
chlorine (0.02% v/v (0.2 mL of XY-12 per 1 liter of
water) / 0.02% w/v (0.2 g of XY-12 per 1 liter of
water)).
DISINFECTION
OF
NONPOROUS
NON-FOOD
CONTACT SURFACES RINSE METHOD: If the
product is to be used immediately, prepare a
disinfecting solution by thoroughly mixing 0.69% v/v
(6.9 mL of XY-12 per 1 liter of water) / 0.83% w/v
(8.30 g of XY-12 per 1 liter of water) to provide
approximately 600 ppm available chlorine by
weight. If the product will be stored for an extended
period of time, between 1 to 8 hours, prepare a
disinfecting solution by mixing 0.81% v/v (8.1 mL of
XY-12 per 1 liter of water) / 0.97% w/v (9.7 g of XY-
12 per 1 liter of water) to provide approximately 700
ppm available chlorine by weight. Clean surfaces,
such as floors and walls, in the normal manner.
Rinse all surfaces thoroughly with the disinfecting
solution, maintaining contact with the solution for at
least 10 minutes. Do not rinse with water after
treatment.
DO NOT MIX WITH ANYTHING BUT WATER
(WATER CHLORINATION): For farm, private or
small municipal water chlorination, feed solution
with a hypochlorinator until an available chlorine
residual of at least 0.2 to 0.6 ppm is attained
throughout the distribution system. Check water
frequently with a chlorine test kit. Bacteriological
sampling must be conducted at a frequency no less
than that prescribed by the National Primary
Drinking Water Regulations. Contact your local
health department for further details. XY-12 is
formulated to control algae and slime growth in
recirculating cooling water systems and evaporative
condensers, as well as cooling tunnels and
warmers. It can be used in cooling water for thermal
processing and pasteurizing operations in dairies,
breweries, soft drink and food canning plants.
For use in federally inspected meat and poultry
plants. XY-12 helps prevent staining of meat and
poultry product containers, when added to the water
used to cook and cool the containers. XY-12 also
assists with corrosion control and deposit formation
on the surfaces of the processing equipment. XY-12
must be used at the same application rates and in
the same manner as described below for Cooling
Tower / Evaporative Condenser Water.
COOLING TOWER / EVAPORATIVE CONDENSER
WATER SLUG FEED METHOD. INITIAL DOSE:
When system is noticeably fouled, apply 0.006-
0.012% v/v (0.06-0.12 mL of XY-12 per 1 liter of
water) / 0.007-0.014% w/v (0.07-0.14 g of XY-12
per 1 liter of water) in the system to obtain from 5 to
10 ppm available chlorine. Repeat until control is
achieved.
SUBSEQUENT DOSE: When microbial control is
evident, add 0.001% v/v (0.01 mL of XY-12 per 1
liter of water) / 0.001% w/v (0.01 g of XY-12 per 1
liter of water) in the system daily, or as needed to
maintain control and keep the chlorine residual at 1
ppm. Badly fouled systems must be cleaned before
treatment is begun.
INTERMITTENT FEED METHOD. INITIAL DOSE:
When system is noticeably fouled, apply 0.006-
0.012% v/v (0.06-0.12 mL of XY-12 per 1 liter of
water) / 0.007-0.014% w/v (0.07-0.14 g of XY-12
per 1 liter of water) in the system to obtain 5 to 10
ppm available chlorine. Apply half (or 1/3, 1/4 or
1/5) of this initial dose when half (or 1/3, 1/4 or 1/5)
of the water in the system has been lost by
blowdown. SUBSEQUENT DOSE: When microbial
control is evident, add 0.001% v/v (0.01 mL of XY-
12 per 1 liter of water) / 0.001% w/v (0.01 g of XY-
12 per 1 liter of water) in the system to obtain a 1
ppm residual. Apply half (or 1/3, 1/4 or 1/5) of this
initial dose when half (or 1/3, 1/4 or 1/5) of the water
in the system has been lost by blowdown. Badly
fouled systems must be cleaned before treatment is
begun.
CONTINUOUS FEED METHOD. INITIAL DOSE:
When system is noticeably fouled, apply 0.006-
0.012% v/v (0.06-0.12 mL of XY-12 per 1 liter of
water) / 0.007-0.014% w/v (0.07-0.14 g of XY-12
per 1 liter of water) in the system to obtain 5 to 10
ppm available chlorine.
SUBSEQUENT DOSE: Maintain this treatment level
by starting a continuous feed of 0.001% v/v (0.01
mL of XY-12 per 1 liter of water) / 0.001% w/v (0.01
g of XY-12 per 1 liter of water) lost by blow down
to maintain a 1 ppm residual. Badly fouled systems
must be cleaned before treatment is begun.
TREATMENT OF POULTRY PROCESSING WATER:
Follow guidelines of local water authority for water
potability treatment. CONTINUOUS FEED: Using an
automatic metering device, continuously feed this
product into the water to obtain and/or maintain a
level of 5-20 ppm available chlorine (0.005-2.000%
v/v (0.05-20.00 mL of XY-12 per 1 liter of water) /
0.007-0.030% w/v (0.07-0.30 g of XY-12 per 1 liter
of water)). Confirm target chlorine level with either a
chlorine test kit or an automatic testing device.
When the available chlorine level reaches 20 ppm,
notify the USDA plant inspector. INTERMITTENT
FEED: Start up by adding 0.001% v/v (0.01 mL of
XY-12 per 1 liter of water) / 0.001% w/v (0.010 g of
XY-12 per 1 liter of water) for each 1 ppm of
available chlorine needed. For subsequent doses,
check chlorine level with a chlorine test kit. Add
enough of this product to maintain the target
chlorine level and confirm this level with a chlorine
test kit. Do not pour this product directly on poultry
product in the water.
AVAILABLE CHLORINE TABLE OF PROPORTIONS
0.5 ppm - 0.006 mL in 1 liter water
50 ppm - 0.62 mL in 1 liter water
100 ppm - 1.15 mL in 1 liter water
200 ppm - 2.30 mL in 1 liter water
600 ppm - 7.00 mL in 1 liter water
LAUNDRY SANITIZATION HOUSEHOLD LAUNDRY
SANITIZING: In soaking suds. Thoroughly mix
0.23% v/v (2.3 mL of XY-12 per 1 liter of water) /
0.28% w/v (2.8 g of XY-12 per 1 liter of water) to
provide 200 ppm available chlorine. Wait 5 minutes,
then add soap or detergent. Immerse laundry for at
least 11 minutes prior to starting the wash/rinse
cycle. In Washing Suds. Thoroughly mix 0.23% v/v
(2.3 mL of XY-12 per 1 liter of water) / 0.28% w/v
(2.8 g of XY-12 per 1 liter of water) containing
clothes to provide 200 ppm available chlorine. Wait
5 minutes, then add soap or detergent and start the
wash/rinse cycle.
COMMERCIAL LAUNDRY SANITIZING: Using the
appropriate Ecolab dispenser, inject 0.23% v/v (2.3
mL of XY-12 per 1 liter of water) / 0.28% w/v (2.8 g
of XY-12 per 1 liter of water) to yield 200 ppm
available chlorine to the bleach step of the wash
process. Test the level of available chlorine if
solution has been allowed to stand. Add more XY-
12 if the available chlorine level has dropped below
200 ppm.
FOOD EGG SANITIZATION: Thoroughly clean all
eggs before proceeding. To sanitize clean shell
eggs intended for food or food products, apply
solution with a coarse spray using 0.23% v/v (2.3
mL of XY-12 per 1 liter of water) / 0.28% w/v (2.8 g
of XY-12 per 1 liter of water) (providing 200 ppm
available chlorine). The solution must be equal to or
warmer than the eggs, but not to exceed 54˚C
(129˚F). Wet eggs thoroughly and allow to drain.
Eggs that have been sanitized with this chlorine
compound may be broken for use in the
manufacture of egg products without a prior potable
water rinse. Eggs must be thoroughly dry before
casing or breaking. The solution must not be reused
for sanitizing eggs.
FRUIT AND VEGETABLE WASHING: Thoroughly
clean all fruits and vegetables in a wash tank.
Thoroughly mix 0.03% v/v (0.3 mL of XY-12 per 1
liter of water) / 0.04% w/v (0.4 g of XY-12 per 1 liter
of water) to make a sanitizing solution of 25 ppm
available chlorine. After draining the tank, submerge
fruits or vegetables for 2 minutes in a second wash
tank containing the recirculating sanitizing solution.
Coarse spray rinse vegetables with the sanitizing
solution prior to packaging. Rinse fruit with potable
water only prior to packaging.

Tsunami 100
Concentrate Ingredient Statement
KEEP OUT OF REACH OF CHILDREN
HAZARDS TO HUMANS AND DOMESTIC ANIMALS
Caution. Causes moderate eye irritation. Harmful in swallowed. Avoid contact with eyes or clothing. Wash
thoroughly with soap and water after handling and before eating, drinking, chewing gum, using tobacco or
using the toilet.
FIRST AID
If in Eyes: Hold eye open and rinse slowly and gently with water for 15-20 minutes. Remove contact lenses,
if present, after the first 5 minutes, then continue rinsing. Call a poison control center or doctor for treatment
advice.
If Swallowed: Call a poison control center or doctor immediately for treatment advice. Have a person sip a
glass of water if able to swallow. Do not induce vomiting unless told to do so by the poison control center or
doctor. Do not give anything by mouth to an unconscious person.
Follow the directions for use listed on the concentrate label when applying this product.
Use solution prepared by end user. NOT TO BE SOLD OR DISTRIBUTED.
en.usage:
It is a violation of Federal law to use this product in a manner inconsistent with its labeling.
FOR PATHOGEN* REDUCTION AND CONTROL IN FRUIT AND VEGETABLE PROCESSING
WATERS IN FOOD FACILITIES:
A.
Batch systems with no makeup water added:
1. Ensure that water is mixing in the processing vessel.
2. Add Tsunami 100 at a rate from 2.5-6.7 fluid ounces per 100 gallons of process water. This
will produce about 215-575 ppm total product and about 30-80 ppm peroxyacetic acid. At
this use dilution, Tsunami 100 will provide a 99.9% reduction against the pathogens
Escherichia coli O157:H7*, Listeria monocytogenes* and Salmonella enterica.*.
3. Measure the residual peroxyacetic acid concentration in the water using a Test Kit (consult

Total:.................................................................................. 100.0%
KEEP OUT OF REACH OF CHILDREN
DANGER
PRECAUTIONARY STATEMENTS
HAZARDS TO HUMANS AND DOMESTIC ANIMALS
CORROSIVE: Causes severe eye damage and skin burns. Harmful or fatal if swallowed. Do not get in
eyes, on skin, or on clothing. Wear chemical goggles, rubber gloves, and protective clothing if handling
concentrate. Wash thoroughly with soap and water after handling and before eating, drinking, and
chewing gum, or using tobacco. Remove any contaminated clothing and wash before re-use.
FIRST AID
IF ON SKIN OR CLOTHING: Take off contaminated clothing. Rinse skin immediately with plenty of
water for 15 –20 minutes. Call a poison control center or doctor for treatment advice.
IF IN EYES: Hold eye open and rinse slowly and gently with water for 15-20 minutes. Remove contact
lenses, if present, after the first 5 minutes, then continue rinsing eye. Call a poison control center or
doctor for treatment advice.
IF SWALLOWED: Call a poison control center or doctor immediately for treatment advice. Have a
person sip a glass of water if able to swallow. Do not induce vomiting unless told to do so by the poison
control center or doctor. Do not give anything by mouth to an unconscious person.
FOR EMERGENCY MEDICAL INFORMATION CALL TOLL-FREE: 1-800-328-0026
Have the product container or label with you when calling a poison control center or doctor, or going for
treatment.
NOTE TO PHYSICIAN: Probable mucosal damage may contraindicate the use of gastric lavage.
See side/back panel for First Aid
PHYSICAL AND CHEMICAL HAZARDS:
Strong oxidizing agent. Corrosive. Do not use in concentrated form. Mix only with water according to
label instructions. Never bring concentrate in contact with other sanitizers, cleaners or organic
substances.
ENVIRONMENTAL HAZARDS: (containers 5 gallons or greater) This product is toxic to birds, fish, and
aquatic invertebrates. Do not discharge effluent containing this product into lakes, streams, ponds,
estuaries, oceans, or other waters unless in accordance with the requirements of a National Pollutant
Discharge Elimination System (NPDES) permit and the permitting authority has been notified in writing
prior to discharge. Do not discharge effluent containing this product to sewer systems without previously
notifying the local sewage treatment plant authority. For guidance contact your State Water Board or
Regional Office of the EPA.

35150, 43890)*, Listeria monocytogenes (ATCC 49594, 19114, 19116)* and Salmonella enterica (ATCC
10721, 6962, 13311).* in fruit and vegetable processing waters. Tsunami 100 also provides control of

en.properties:
Tsunami 100 is a peroxyacetic acid antimicrobial water additive used to control of bacterial growth and mix
with water to wash fruits and vegetables, prior to doing the food processing in the food industry.
en.usage:
1. Rinse all surfaces of fruits and vegetables thoroughly with water to eliminate the heavy soil.
2. Mix Tsunami 100 with water to produce about 30-80 ppm of peroxyacetic acid in used solution. This can
be accomplished by initially adding 1 part of Tsunami 100 with 2,000 parts of water (concentration at 20-50 ml
of Tsunami 100 per 100 liters of water or 0.02-0.05% v/v).
3. The fruits and vegetables can be soaked in the solution for a minimum contact time of 45 seconds then drain
adequately
4. Rinse with clean water again.
Remark: Consult your Ecolab Specialist for specific use directions.
CAUTIONS
1. DO NOT drink or inhale.
2. Avoid contacting with eyes, skin, and clothes or inhaling before and after the dilution.
3. Use rubber gloves, rubber shoes, and mask when using this product. After used, please wash hands, rubber
gloves, and shoes with water and soap.
4. DO NOT pour Tsunami 100 back to its container or mix with other products.
5. Use Tsunami 100 in well-ventilated place.
6. DO NOT dispose Tsunami 100 or its used container into river, canal, or public water source.
HANDLING PROCEDURES
Keep closed container in dry, cold, locked and well-ventilated place and keep away from children, food, pets,
flame, heat, flammable substance, acid, alkaline, amine and reducing agent such as metal.
FIRST AID
1. If skin contact: Flush with plenty of water. Remove clothes and wash with water and soap. Seek medical
attention if irritation persists.
2. If eyes contact: Immediately flush with plenty of water until irritation has been reduced. Seek medical attention
if irritation persists.
3. If inhaled: Immediately move to fresh air.
4. If swallowed: DO NOT induce vomiting. Rinse mouth at once then drink large glasses of water or milk. Seek
medical attention immediately with its packaging or label.
FOR MORE DETAILED INFORMATION, PLEASE REFER TO THE SAFETY DATA SHEET

Tên sản phẩm: Chất khử trùng TSUNAMI 100
Mã nhận dạng hóa chất: Không có thông tin
Khối lượng tịnh: 25 kg
Thành phần: Axit Acetic 30-40%; Peroxyacetic acid, loại F, được ổn định 15-30%; hydrogen peroxyt 10-13%.
Hướng dẫn sử dụng và bảo quản: Tráng rửa trước với nước để loại bỏ các chất bẩn nặng. Pha Tsunami 100 với nước sao cho được
30-80 ppm peroxyacetic acid trong dung dịch sử dụng. Có thể thực hiện thêm vào ban đầu 1 phần Tsunami 100 với 2000 phần nước (nồng độ
20-50 mL Tsunami 100 trong 100 lít nước hoặc 0.02-0.05 % v/v) / (nồng độ của 20-50 g Tsunami 100 trong 100 lít nước hoặc 0.02-0.05 % w/v).
Trái cây và rau củ có thể nhúng vào trong dung dịch trong ít nhất 45 giây, sau đó để ráo và tráng lại với nước sạch. Các ứng dụng khác, vui
lòng xem thêm trên nhãn chính và tờ thông tin sản phẩm.
Bảo quản ở nhiệt độ -10 and 50°C.

Biện pháp phòng ngừa:
Để xa các nguồn nhiệt/tia lửa/lửa /các bề mặt nóng. Không hút thuốc. Để/ Lưu trữ xa quần áo/ vật liệu dễ cháy. Đưa ra cảnh báo để tránh
trộn lẫn với các chất dễ cháy. Chỉ lưu trữ sản phẩm trong thùng chứa gốc. Rửa sạch da thật kỹ sau khi thao tác với hoá chất. Không được ăn,
uống hoặc hút thuốc khi sử dụng sản phẩm này. Không được hít bụi hoặc sương. Tránh thải sản phẩm hóa chất ra môi trường. Đeo găng
tay bảo hộ/ mặc quần áo bảo hộ/ bảo vệ mắt/ bảo vệ mặt. Không được trộn với thuốc tẩy hoặc sản phẩm chứa clo khác – sẽ tạo ra khí clo.
Trong trường hợp cháy: Sử dụng cát, hóa chất khô hoặc bọt chịu cồn để dập tắt. NẾU NUỐT PHẢI: Súc miệng. KHÔNG ĐƯỢC gây nôn.
NẾU TIẾP XÚC LÊN DA (hoặc tóc): Nhanh chóng cởi bỏ tất cả quần áo bị nhiễm hoá chất. Rửa sạch da bằng nước/ vòi sen. NẾU HÍT PHẢI:
Di chuyển nạn nhân tới chỗ không khí thoáng mát và thoải mái để thở. NẾU BAY VÀO MẮT: Rửa cẩn thận bằng nước trong một vài phút.
Tháo bỏ kính áp tròng nếu có và dễ làm. Tiếp tục rửa. Gọi ngay cho TRUNG TÂM CHỐNG ĐỘC hoặc bác sỹ. Giặt sạch quần áo đã nhiễm
hóa chất trước khi tái sử dụng.
Lưu giữ tại nơi được khoá cẩn thận. Tránh ánh sáng mặt trời. Lưu giữ ở xa các vật liệu khác. Bảo quản ở nhiệt độ không quá 35⁰C. Giữ mát.
Lưu trữ ở nơi có sự thông thoáng tốt. Giữ thùng chứa luôn đóng kín.
Tiêu hủy thành phần bên trong/ thùng chứa hóa chất tại cơ sở xử lý chất thải đủ tiêu chuẩn.

en.usage:
For Fruit and Vegetable Surfaces and Processing Water:
1. Rinse all surfaces thoroughly with water to eliminate the heavy soil.
2. Mix Tsunami 100 with water to produce about 30-80 ppm peroxyacetic acid in used
solution. This can be accomplished by initially adding 1 part of Tsunami 100 with
2,000 parts of water (concentration at 20-50 mL Tsunami 100 per 100 liters of water or
0.02-0.05 % v/v) / (concentration at 20-50 g Tsunami 100 per 100 liters of water or
0.02-0.05 % w/v).
3. The fruits and vegetables can be dipped in the solution for a minimum contact time of
45 seconds, followed by adequate draining and rinse with clean water.
For Seed Production Industries:
1. Rinse all surfaces thoroughly with water to eliminate any soiling.
2. Mix 1-1.2 % w/v Tsunami 100 (10-12 g of Tsunami 100 per 1 liter of water) /
1-1.2 % v/v Tsunami 100 (10-12 mL of Tsunami 100 per 1 liter of water).
3. The fruits and vegetables can be dipped in the solution for a minimum contact time of
90 seconds.
4. Drain and rinse with clean potable water.

en.properties:
Tsunami® 100 is an EPA registered antimicrobial water additive for pathogen*
reduction in fruit and vegetable processing water. Tsunami 100 is
recommended for use in the process waters of post harvest, fresh cut and
processed fruits and vegetables in both batch and continuous operations.
Tsunami 100 is also registered for use in spraying or dipping fruits and
vegetables to control microbial growth that causes decay or spoilage on the
surface of produce.
Tsunami 100 may be used as a water additive in fruit and vegetable processing
water on products labeled as organic in food processing facilities on both raw
agricultural commodities and on fruits and vegetables that will be further
processed.
Tsunami 100 is not for use to control microorganisms on hard surfaces such as
tanks, lines, or flume surfaces or food processing equipment.
Used as directed, Tsunami 100 reduces 99.9% of the pathogens Escherichia
coli O157:H7*, Listeria monocytogenes* and Salmonella enterica* in fruit and
vegetable processing waters. Tsunami 100 also provides control of spoilage
and decay causing non-public health organisms present in processing waters
and on the surface of post-harvest, fresh-cut and processed fruits and
vegetables.
Promotes Quality Assurance
y Low reactivity with organics and soils assures consistent dosage is available
for microbial control.
y Successfully applied in all major processing steps including multi-stage
flumes, chill tanks, coolers and various washing equipment in fresh cut, post
harvest and further processed facilities.
y Tsunami is OMRI certified for organic production.
y No pH control necessary - effective microbial control at acid to slightly
alkaline pH.
y Broad applicability to all vegetables and fruits, both whole and cut.
y No rinse required.
Environmental Implications
y Single product, ready-to-feed liquid; requires no precursor chemicals or on-
site generation equipment.
y Rapidly breaks down after use into water, oxygen and acetic acid.
Enhances Overall Plant Economics
y Eliminates need for generation equipment, precursor chemicals and
maintenance.
y Reduced labor, water and chemical costs.
y Controls fruit and vegetable surface microbial activity so product spoilage is
minimized and shelf life is enhanced.

en.usage:
For Sanitizing
1. Prior to sanitizing, rinse all surfaces thoroughly with water then wash with
detergent solution, followed by a potable rinse.
2. Mix Oxonia Active 150 at concentration of 0.1 % w/v (concentration 1 g per
1 liter of water) / 0.09 % v/v (concentration 0.9 mL per 1 liter of water).
3. Circulate in CIP, spray or pour on all surfaces to be disinfected, allow contact
time at least 1 minute.
4. Rinse with clean potable water.
For Disinfection
1. Prior to disinfection, rinse all surfaces thoroughly with water then wash with
detergent solution, followed by a potable rinse.
2. Mix Oxonia Active 150 at concentration of 0.1-1.5 % w/v (concentration 1-15
g per 1 liter of water) / 0.09-1.34 % v/v (concentration 0.9-13.4 mL per 1 liters
of water).
3. Circulate in CIP, spray or pour on all surfaces to be disinfected, allow contact
time at least 10 minutes.
. Rinse with clean potable water.
For Fogging
1. Prior to Fogging, remove food and container from the room or tightly
covering.
2. Spray Oxonia Active 150 at concentration of 0.1-1.0 % w/v (concentration
1-10 g per 1 liter of water) / 0.09-0.88 % v/v (concentration 0.9-88 mL per
1 liters of water) per 28.32 m3 and allow contact time at least 2 hours.
3. Rinse with clean potable water.

en.properties:
P3-Oxonia Active is a concentrated, broad spectrum peroxyacetic
acid antimicrobial agent for use in a number of sanitizing applications
in the brewery, beverage, dairy and food processing industries.
Saves Time and Money
• Non-foaming formulation minimizes CIP cycle time and
improves CIP cleaning efficiency
• Convenient to use-provides acidified rinse and sanitizer in one
step – no post-rinse needed, unless required by local
regulations
Promotes Quality Assurance
• Enhances finished product quality when used in total Ecolab
product and professional services program, since it has fast,
broad spectrum kill against many pathogenic organisms, even
spore-forming microorganisms
• Superior sanitizing activity in most conditions including colder
water temperatures, down to 4˚C (40˚F)
• pH tolerant – effective sanitizing activity at acidic to neutral pH
conditions
• Helps protect processing equipment investment – use-
solutions non-corrosive to 304, 316 stainless steel and
aluminum surfaces when used at recommended
concentrations
• Compatible with most plastic and rubber materials used in
processing operations
• Highly effective against environmental microorganisms that
can adversely affect shelf-life
Environmentally Responsible
• Phosphate-free formulation minimizes phosphate-related
effluent fees
• Rapidly breaks down after use into water, oxygen and acidic
acid
P3-Oxonia Active
Superior Peroxyacetic Acid Sanitizer
TO USE
Form..................................liquid, clear
Color......................................colorless
Odor....................pungent, acidic acid
Foam............................................none
pH (1.0 solution)...........................3.3
Specific gravity at 20˚C..............1.12
en.usage:
To sanitize hard room surfaces as an adjunct to acceptable manual cleaning and disinfecting
of room surfaces: Prior to fogging, food products and packaging materials must be removed
from the room or carefully protected. Fog desired areas using 1 liter per 30 m3 (one quart per
1,000 cu. ft.) of room area with a 0.30 to 2.0% P3-Oxonia Active solution. Vacate all
personnel from the area during fogging and until the room is safe to re-enter. Allow surfaces
to drain thoroughly before operations are resumed. Solutions above 0.5% may be corrosive
and are not to be used on all surfaces. Test solutions on surfaces prior to use.
Final Sanitizing Bottle Rinse
P3-Oxonia Active may be used as a final sanitizing rinse for returnable and non-returnable
bottles at a 0.2% dilution. Residue compatibility must be verified for each product.
Note: For Mechanical Operations, prepared use-solution may not be reused for sanitizing
but, may be reused for other purposes such as cleaning.
Note: For Manual Operations, fresh sanitizing solutions should be prepared at least daily or
more often if the solution becomes diluted or soiled.
Note: This product in its use-solution is compatible with stainless steel and aluminum
surfaces. If product is intended to be used on any other surface, it is recommended that you
apply product to a smaller test area to determine compatibility before proceeding with its
use.
en.ingredients:
Peroxyacetic acid...................4.5%
Hydrogen peroxide...............27.0%
Sanitation
P3-Oxonia Active acid sanitizer is recommended for use on pre-cleaned surfaces such as
equipment, pipelines, tanks, vats, fillers, evaporators, pasteurizers and aseptic equipment in
dairies, breweries, wineries, beverage and food processing plants. P3-Oxonia Active is an
effective sanitizer when sanitizing solution is prepared in water of up to 500 ppm hardness
expressed as CaCO3.
Sanitizing Food Contact Surfaces
Prior to sanitizing, remove gross food particles, then wash with a detergent solution,
followed by a potable water rinse. Sanitize with a P3-Oxonia Active at a concentration of
0.20 to 0.40%. At this dilution, P3-Oxonia Active is effective against Staphylococcus aureus,
Escherichia coli, Listeria monocytogenes, Salmonella typhimurium, Pseudomonas
aeruginosa, Saccharomyces cerevisae and Vibrio cholerae. Also effective against organisms
found in the brewing industry such as Pedioccus damnosus and Lactobacillus buchneri. Use
immersion, coarse spray or circulation techniques as appropriate to the equipment. All
surfaces should be exposed to the sanitizing solution for a period of not less than two
minutes, unless otherwise specified by governing sanitary code. Drain thoroughly and allow
to air dry. Do not rinse, unless local regulations require a rinse.

ACID SANITIZER
