SATURATION FOR SPOILAGE ORGANISMS: To treat
large areas of hard surfaces by surface saturation: Prior to
application, food products and packaging materials must
be removed from the room or carefully protected. Saturate
desired areas using a 0.3% - 3.0 % Oxonia Active solution
(3 - 30 fl. oz. per 8 gallons of water). Vacate the area of all
personnel during large area application and until the hydrogen
peroxide air concentration is below 0.5 ppm. Allow surfaces
to drain thoroughly before operations are resumed. Solutions
above 0.5% may be corrosive and are not to be used on all
surfaces. Test solutions on surfaces prior to use. All hard non-
porous food contact surfaces must be rinsed thoroughly with a
potable water rinse.
ANTIMICROBIAL RINSE OF PRE-CLEANED OR NEW
RETURNABLE OR NON-RETURNABLE CONTAINERS:
To reduce the number of the beverage spoilage organisms,
Pediococcus damnosus, Lactobacillus malefermentans,
and Saccharomyces cerevisiae, apply Oxonia Active at a
concentration of 1.0% - 4.0% (10 - 40 fl. oz. per 8 gallons
of water) at a temperature of (40 - 60 °C) (104 - 140 °F) for
at least 7 seconds. After thorough draining, rinse interior
container surfaces with a disinfected water rinse free of
pathogenic bacteria.1
ANTIMICROBIAL TREATMENT OF WATER FILTERS
To reduce the number of the beverage spoilage organisms
Pediococcus damnosus, Lactobacillus malefermentans and
Saccharomyces cerevisiae. Clean the water filters with a
detergent solution followed by a potable water rinse. Apply
Oxonia Active as a 0.5 - 2.0% (5 - 20 fl. oz. per 8 gallons of
water) solution at (25 °C) (77 ºF) for a minimum contact time
of 5 minutes. After thorough draining, rinse filters with a
disinfected water rinse free of pathogenic bacteria.1 Consult
filter manufacturer for filter compatibility guidelines. Conduct
filter treatment while the process is not in operation.
ANTIMICROBIAL TREATMENT OF REVERSE OSMOSIS
WATER MEMBRANES
To reduce the number of the beverage spoilage organisms
Pediococcus damnosus, Lactobacillus malefermentans and
Saccharomyces cerevisiae. Clean the RO system with a
detergent solution followed by a potable water rinse. Apply
Oxonia Active as a 0.1-0.2% (1 - 2.1 fl. oz. per 8 gallons of water)
use solution at (24 °C) (75 ºF) for a minimum contact time of 5
minutes. After treatment with Oxonia Active use solution, rinse
membranes thoroughly with a disinfected water rinse free of
pathogenic bacteria.1 Do not treat membranes more than once
per week. Consult membrane manufacturer for membrane
compatibility guidelines. Conduct membrane treatment while
the membrane system is off-line.
ANTIMICROBIAL TREATMENT OF FOOD PROCESSING
MEMBRANES
To reduce the number of the spoilage organisms Pediococcus
damnosus, Lactobacillus malefermentans, Saccharomyces
cerevisiae, Sphingomonas paucimobilis, and Aureobacterium
esteraromaticum. Check with membrane manufacturer
to ensure membrane compatibility is acceptable with the
particular concentrations and conditions of use.
Ultrafiltration and Microfiltration Membranes: Use 2 - 10.2 fl.
oz. of Oxonia Active per 8 gallons of water (2,000 - 10,000 ppm
v/v) at (24 °C) (75 ºF) for a minimum contact time of 5 minutes.
Membranes can be treated daily. Conduct membrane treatment
while food processing is not in operation. After treatment with
Oxonia Active use solution, rinse membranes thoroughly with
disinfected water free of pathogenic bacteria.1
Reverse Osmosis and Filtration Membranes: Use 0.9 - 10.2 fl.
oz. of Oxonia Active per 8 gallons of water (900 - 10,000 ppm
v/v) at (24 °C) (75 ºF) for a minimum contact time of
5 minutes. Do not treat membranes more than once per week.
Conduct membrane treatment while food processing is not in
operation. After treatment with Oxonia Active use solution,
rinse membranes thoroughly with disinfected water free of
pathogenic bacteria.1
1A disinfected water rinse free of pathogenic bacteria is
equivalent to a water rinse using water disinfected by ozone,
ultraviolet radiation, chlorine dioxide, filtration, chlorine or
chlorine compounds.
FOGGING – NON-PUBLIC HEALTH
(This product can be applied by fogging to control the
growth of non-public health spoilage and decay causing
bacteria on hard, non-porous surfaces in dairies, beverage
and food processing plants including meat and poultry
processing facilities. All surfaces must be pre-cleaned prior
to fogging.)
Processing Plants (including meat and poultry processing
facilities)):
Prior to fogging, food products and packaging material must
be removed from the room or carefully protected. The room
or building must be vacant of all personnel during and at least
two hours after the fogging treatment. Calculate volume of the
room to determine volume of solution needed to fog (one quart
per 1000 cu. ft. of room area). Prepare a solution containing
1.0 - 1.4 fl. oz. per 4 gallons of water (0.20 - 0.28% v/v
concentration) and fog using a mechanical fogging apparatus.
Fog product for length of time necessary to fill room based
on fogging apparatus manufacturer directions. Surfaces must
remain undisturbed for 5 minutes [after room fill is achieved]
before initiating aeration of the room.
Do not enter the treated area for a minimum of 2 hours [or 8
air exchanges (ACH)] after fogging is completed. If the room
or building must be entered prior to complete aeration, the
individual must wear a self- contained respirator approved by
NIOSH/MSHA, goggles, long sleeves, and long pants.
The fog generated is irritating to the eyes, skin and mucous
membranes. Wear a dust mist respirator when mixing the use
solution and pouring it into the mechanical fogging apparatus.
All food contact surfaces must be thoroughly rinsed with
potable water prior to sanitizing with an EPA approved food
contact sanitizer.
DISINFECTION AGAINST POUTLRY & LIVESTOCK VIRUSES
VIRUCIDAL ACTIVITY: Oxonia Active is effective as a
disinfectant against poultry and livestock viruses on hard, non-
porous surfaces of agricultural facilities and equipment, dairy
processing facilities, military facilities and equipment, airport
facilities and equipment, port facilities and equipment, rail facilities
and equipment, quarantine facilities and equipment, slaughter
facilities and equipment (including processing facilities), shipping
facilities and equipment, and similar sites where animals, animal
by-products or soil contaminants suspected of harboring the
following poultry and livestock pathogens:
Influenza A Virus (H10N7), Avian Influenza A Virus (H5N1),
Newcastle Disease Virus, Infectious Bronchitis Virus, Avian
Reovirus, Infectious Bovine Rhinotracheitis Virus (IBR),
Parainfluenza 3 Virus, and the Foot & Mouth Disease Virus
(Aphthovirus).
Within these facilities, hard non-porous surfaces of treated
objects include, but are not limited to, vehicles, farm equipment
(including tractors, plough shares, cars and trucks, farm
engines, harvesters, loaders, mowers, tillers and slaughter
machinery), military equipment (including tanks and troop
carriers), and shipping equipment (bins and containers).
Apply a 0.4% (2 fl. oz. / 4 gallons of water) solution of Oxonia
Active with a mop, cloth, brush or coarse spray to disinfect
walls, ceilings, floors, decks, container surfaces, vehicles, water
proof footwear (such as rubber boots), livestock equipment,
utensils, hoses, and instruments. Wet all surfaces and allow to
remain wet for 10 minutes. Allow surfaces to air dry and rinse
with potable water before reuse.
NOTE: This product in its use solutions is compatible with
stainless steel and aluminum surfaces. If product is intended to
be used on any other surface, it is recommended that you apply
product to a smaller test area to determine compatibility before
proceeding with its use.
STERILIZATION
STERILIZATION OF MANUFACTURING, FILLING, AND
PACKAGING EQUIPMENT IN ASEPTIC PROCESSES:
Prior to use of this product, remove gross soil particles from
processing surfaces, then wash with a recommended detergent
solution, followed by a thorough potable water rinse. Prepare
a sterilizing solution by diluting 6.4 fl. oz. Oxonia Active
concentrate per each gallon of water (50 mL/liter) (5.0% v/v).
Circulate, coarse spray, or flood the sterilizing solution through
the system. All surfaces must be exposed to the sterilizing
solution for a minimum exposure time based on the product
solution temperature. The following time and temperature
relationships are required:

Thoroughly rinse food contact surfaces with either a sterile
water or potable water rinse. For food-contact surfaces, follow

to drain thoroughly prior to any food product contact. This
product is an effective sporicide against Bacillus subtilis and
Clostridium sporogenes when used per the label directions.
NOTE: This product in its use solutions is compatible with
stainless steel and aluminum surfaces. If product is intended to
be used on any other surface, it is recommended that you apply

proceeding with its use.
CLEANER
BOOSTER FOR ALKALINE DETERGENTS TO CLEAN
FOOD PROCESSING EQUIPMENT: Oxonia Active is an
effective oxygen bleach cleaning booster for use with alkaline
detergents. For cleaning applications as a detergent booster,
use 0.5 - 2.5% v/v total product (0.64 - 3.2 fl. oz. per gallon of
detergent use solution) to aid in the removal of organic soils.
All hard, non-porous food contact surfaces treated with this
boosted detergent must be rinsed thoroughly with a potable
water rinse followed by sanitizing with an approved food
contact surface sanitizer.
BOOSTER FOR ACID DETERGENTS TO CLEAN FOOD
PROCESSING EQUIPMENT: Oxonia Active is an effective
oxygen bleach cleaning booster for use with acidic detergents.
For cleaning applications as a detergent booster, use 0.5 - 2.5%
v/v total product (0.64 - 3.2 fl. oz. per gallon of detergent
use solution) to aid in the removal of organic soils. All hard,
non-porous food contact surfaces treated with this boosted
detergent must be rinsed thoroughly with a potable water rinse
followed by sanitizing with an approved food contact surface
sanitizer.

SANITIZATION
Oxonia Active acid sanitizer is recommended for use on hard,
non-porous, pre-cleaned surfaces such as equipment, pipelines,
tanks, vats, fillers, evaporators, pasteurizers and aseptic
equipment in dairies, dairy farms, breweries, wineries, biofuel
producing facilities, beverage and food processing plants. This
product is effective as a sanitizer when solution is prepared in
water of up to 500 ppm hardness as CaCO3.
NOTE: FOR MECHANICAL OPERATIONS prepared use solution
may not be reused for sanitizing but may be reused for other
purposes such as cleaning.
FOR MANUAL OPERATIONS fresh sanitizing solutions must be
prepared at least daily or more often if the solution becomes
diluted or soiled.
SANITIZING FOOD CONTACT SURFACES: Prior to sanitizing,
remove gross food particles, and then wash with a detergent
solution, followed by a potable water rinse. Sanitize hard,
non-porous surfaces with a concentration of 1.0 - 1.4 fl. oz.
Oxonia Active concentrate per 4 gallons of water (0.20-0.28%
v/v concentration). At this dilution Oxonia Active is effective
against Staphylococcus aureus, Escherichia coli, Escherichia
coli O157:H7, Listeria monocytogenes, Salmonella typhimurium,
Pseudomonas aeruginosa, and Vibrio cholerae. It is also
effective against organisms found in the brewing industry,
Saccharomyces cerevisiae, Pediococcus damnosus and
Lactobacillus malefermentans. Use immersion, coarse spray
or circulation techniques as appropriate to the equipment.
All surfaces must be exposed to the sanitizing solution for
a period of not less than 1 minute unless a longer time is
specified by the governing sanitary code. Drain thoroughly and
allow to air dry. Do not rinse.
CONTINUOUS TREATMENT OF CONVEYORS: Wash, rinse
and sanitize conveyor equipment. During processing, apply
Oxonia Active at no more than 0.20% - 0.28% v/v (1 - 1.4 fl. oz.
per 4 gallons of water) concentration to hard, non-porous
surfaces of the conveyor with Mikro Master or other suitable
feeding equipment. At this dilution Oxonia Active is effective
against Staphylococcus aureus, Escherichia coli, Escherichia
coli 0157:H7, Listeria monocytogenes, Salmonella typhimurium,
Pseudomonas aeruginosa and Vibrio cholerae. Controlled
volumes of Oxonia Active are applied to return portion of
conveyor through nozzles so located as to permit maximum
drainage of Oxonia Active from equipment and to prevent
puddles on top of belt. During interruptions in operations,
coarse spray the processing equipment with Oxonia Active
solution at not more that 0.28% v/v concentration. Conveyor
equipment must be free of product when applying coarse
spray. Conveyor surface must be exposed to the sanitizing
solution for a period of not less than 1 minute.
SANITIZE PRE-CLEANED OR NEW RETURNABLE OR
NON-RETURNABLE CONTAINERS: To sanitize pre-cleaned
or new returnable or non-returnable containers for processing,
apply Oxonia Active at a concentration of 0.3% - 1.0% (3 - 10
fl. oz. per 8 gallons or water) at a temperature of (40 - 60 °C)
(104 - 140 °F) for at least 20 seconds. At these conditions,
Oxonia Active is effective against Staphylococcus aureus,
Escherichia coli and Pseudomonas aeruginosa. After thorough
draining, rinse interior container surfaces with a disinfected
water rinse free of pathogenic bacteria.1
SANITIZE PRE-CLEANED OR NEW RETURNABLE OR NON-
RETURNABLE CONTAINERS: To sanitize pre-cleaned or new
returnable or non-returnable containers for processing, apply
Oxonia Active at a concentration of 1.0% - 4.0% (10 - 40 fl. oz.
per 8 gallons or water) at a temperature of (40 - 60 °C) (104 -
140 °F) for at least 7 seconds. At these conditions, Oxonia
Active is effective against Staphylococcus aureus, Escherichia
coli, Salmonella typhimurium, Pediococcus damnosus,
Lactobacillus malefermentans and Saccharomyces cerevisiae.
After thorough draining, rinse interior container surfaces with
a disinfected water rinse free of pathogenic bacteria.1
FINAL SANITIZING CONTAINER RINSE: This product
may be used as a final sanitizing rinse, followed by adequate
draining, for returnable and non-returnable containers at
a 1% - 4% dilution (10 - 40 fl. oz. per 8 gallons of water)
at temperature of (40 - 60 °C) (104 - 140 °F) for at least 7
seconds.
SANITIZING NON-FOOD CONTACT SURFACES: Prior to
sanitizing, remove gross soil particles and then wash with
a detergent solution followed by a potable water rinse.
Sanitize hard, non-porous, non-food contact surfaces such
as floors, walls, tables, chairs, benches, drains, troughs, and
drip pans with 1 fl. oz. Oxonia Active per 8 gal water. At this
concentration the product is effective against Staphylococcus
aureus, Enterobacter aerogenes, Escherichia coli, Listeria
monocytogenes, Salmonella typhimurium, Pseudomonas
aeruginosa, and Saccharomyces cerevisiae. It is also effective
against organisms found in the brewing industry, Pediococcus
damnosus and Lactobacillus malefermentans. All surfaces
must be exposed to the sanitizing solution for a period of not
less than 5 minutes. Drain thoroughly and allow to air dry. No
rinse necessary.
Oxonia Active™
ACID SANITIZER
Oxonia Active™
FOAM SANITIZING NON-FOOD CONTACT SURFACES: (This
use not approved in the state of California) Oxonia Active is an
effective foam sanitizer of pre-cleaned, hard, non-porous, non-
food contact surfaces, such as boots, floors, walls, drains, and
associated equipment. For this application, prepare a solution
of 0.2% v/v (1 fl. oz. per 4 gallons water) Oxonia Active and
0.13% v/v (0.7 fl. oz. per 4 gallons water) Liquid K. For example,
in four gallons of water, add 1 fl. oz. of Oxonia Active and 0.7 fl.
oz. of Liquid K. Liquid K is the only approved foam generator.
Apply solution as a foam using recommended equipment
such as a Super Foamer. Wet surfaces thoroughly. At this
concentration, the product is effective against Staphylococcus
aureus, Enterobacter aerogenes and Listeria monocytogenes.
Surfaces must be exposed to the sanitizing foam for a period
of not less than 5 minutes. No rinse is necessary. Contact
your Ecolab representative for information on Liquid K and a
recommended foamer.
SANITIZING NON-FOOD CONTACT PACKAGING
EQUIPMENT
Prior to use of this product, remove gross soil particles from
surfaces. Wash with a recommended detergent solution and
rinse thoroughly with potable water. For sanitization against
the beverage spoilage organisms Pediococcus damnosus,
Lactobacillus malefermentans and Saccharomyces cerevisiae,
apply 0.5 - 4.0% (5 - 40 fl. oz. per 8 gallons of water) of Oxonia
Active to hard, non-porous surfaces at a temperature of (25 - 45
°C) (77 - 113 °F) and allow to remain wet for at least 5 minutes.
Allow surfaces to drain thoroughly before operations are
resumed.
SANITIZING NON-POROUS GLOVED HANDS: To reduce
cross-contamination from area to area in animal areas and
packaging and storage areas of food plants, dip pre-washed
(plastic, latex, or other synthetic rubber) non-porous gloved
hands into a suitable clean container that contains enough
freshly made sanitizing solution to cover the gloved area.
Prepare the sanitizing solution by adding 1 - 1.4 fl. oz. Oxonia
Active per 4 gal. of water (0.20 - 0.28% v/v concentration)
(or equivalent use dilution). Dip (soak) gloves in solution for 1
minute. Do not let sanitizing solution come into contact with
the exposed skin. Change the solution in the bath at least daily
or more often if the solution becomes diluted or visibly soiled.

ANTIMICROBIAL
To treat large areas of hard surfaces by surface saturation: Prior to application, [food] products and
packaging materials must be removed from the room or carefully protected. Saturate desired areas
using a 0.3% - 3.0 % Oxonia Active solution (3 - 30 fl. oz. per 8 gallons of [water] [tap water] [up to
500 ppm hard water]). Vacate the area of all personnel during large area application and until the
hydrogen peroxide air concentration is below 0.5 ppm. Allow surfaces to drain thoroughly before
operations are resumed. Solutions above 0.5% may be corrosive and are not to be used on all
surfaces. Test solutions on surfaces prior to use. All hard, non-porous food contact surfaces must
be rinsed thoroughly with a potable water rinse.
ANTIMICROBIAL RINSE OF PRE-CLEANED OR NEW RETURNABLE OR NON-RETURNABLE
CONTAINERS
To reduce the number of the [beverage] spoilage organisms, Pediococcus damnosus (ATCC
25248), Lactobacillus malefermentans (ATCC 11305), and Saccharomyces cerevisiae (ATCC 834),
apply Oxonia Active at a concentration of 1.0% - 4.0% (10 - 40 fl. oz. per 8 gallons of [water] [tap
water] [up to 500 ppm hard water]) at a temperature of (40 - 60 °C) (104 - 140 °F) for at least 7
seconds. After thorough draining, rinse interior container surfaces with a [potable] water rinse.
ANTIMICROBIAL TREATMENT OF WATER FILTERS
To reduce the number of the [beverage] spoilage organisms Pediococcus damnosus (ATCC
25248), Lactobacillus malefermentans (ATCC 11305) and Saccharomyces cerevisiae (ATCC 834).
Clean the water filters with a detergent solution followed by a potable water rinse. Apply Oxonia
Active as a 0.5 - 2.0% (5 - 20 fl. oz. per 8 gallons of [water] [tap water] [up to 500 ppm hard water])
solution [at (25 °C) (77 ºF)] for a minimum contact time of 5 minutes. After thorough draining, rinse
filters with a [potable] water rinse. Consult filter manufacturer for filter compatibility guidelines.
Conduct filter treatment while the process is not in operation.
ANTIMICROBIAL TREATMENT OF REVERSE OSMOSIS WATER MEMBRANES
To reduce the number of the [beverage] spoilage organisms Pediococcus damnosus (ATCC
25248), Lactobacillus malefermentans (ATCC 11305) and Saccharomyces cerevisiae (ATCC 834).
Clean the RO system with a detergent solution followed by a potable water rinse. Apply Oxonia
Active as a 0.1 - 0.2% (1 - 2.1 fl. oz. per 8 gallons of [water] [tap water] [up to 500 ppm hard water])
use solution [at (24 °C) (75 ºF)] for a minimum contact time of 5 minutes. After treatment with
Oxonia Active use solution, rinse membranes thoroughly with a [potable] water rinse. [Do not treat
membranes more than once per week.] Consult membrane manufacturer for membrane
compatibility guidelines. Conduct membrane treatment while the membrane system is off-line.
ANTIMICROBIAL TREATMENT OF [FOOD] PROCESSING MEMBRANES
To reduce the number of the spoilage organisms Pediococcus damnosus (ATCC 25248),
Lactobacillus malefermentans (ATCC 11305), Saccharomyces cerevisiae (ATCC 834),
Sphingomonas paucimobilis (ATCC 10829), and Aureobacterium esteraromaticum (ATCC 958).
[Check with membrane manufacturer to ensure membrane compatibility is acceptable with the
particular concentrations and conditions of use.]
Ultrafiltration and Microfiltration Membranes: Use 2.0 - 2.5 fl. oz. of Oxonia Active per 8 gallons
of [water] [tap water] [up to 500 ppm hard water] (2,000 - 2,500 ppm v/v) for a minimum contact
time of 5 minutes. For extreme fouling situations, use up to 10.2 fl. oz. of Oxonia Active per 8
gallons of [water] [tap water] [up to 500 ppm hard water] (10,000 ppm v/v). Conduct membrane

ANTIMICROBIAL RINSE FOR REDUCING SLIME-FORMING / (BIOFOULING) (AND) (NON-
PUBLIC HEALTH SPOILAGE) BACTERIA ON MEMBRANES (Not for use in California)
Oxonia Active with Ultrasil 740 may be used to reduce ((slime-forming)/(biofouling) (and) (non-
public health spoilage) bacteria) on Microfiltration (MF), Ultrafiltration (UF), Nanofiltration (NF), and
Reverse Osmosis (RO) membranes used in food handling/storage establishments, food and
beverage manufacturing, human drinking water systems, biofuel producing facilities, and industrial
processes and water systems. Prior to use, check with the membrane manufacturer to confirm
chemical compatibility.
Prior to antimicrobial rinsing, remove visible food particles, then wash with a detergent solution,
followed by a potable water rinse. Prepare a solution containing both Oxonia Active and Ultrasil
740. First, add 1.1 - 1.4 fl. oz. of Ultrasil 740 per gallon of [water] [tap water] [up to 500 ppm hard
water] (0.9 - 1.1% v/v concentration), then add 0.25 - 0.32 fl. oz. of Oxonia Active per gallon of the
Ultrasil 740 solution (0.2 - 0.25% v/v concentration). Temper the solution to a minimum of (43 °C)
(110 °F) and apply to the membrane by circulation for at least 5 minutes. Drain the solution from
the membrane and rinse the membrane thoroughly with water.
Used as directed, treatment will kill at least 99.9% of slime-forming (and non-public health spoilage)
bacteria on MF, UF, NF and RO membranes. Cleaning effectiveness is verified by monitoring
pressure drop across the membrane, or other parameter as appropriate, during ((slime-
forming)/(biofouling) bacteria) control treatment.
Membrane Cleaning
For Food Plant and Industrial use
Use on Microfiltration (MF), Ultrafiltration (UF), Nanofiltration (NF), and Reverse Osmosis (RO)
membranes. Consult membrane manufacturer for membrane compatibility guidelines.
Oxonia Active is an effective cleaning booster for use with alkaline and acid membrane compatible
detergents. For membrane cleaning applications as a detergent booster, use 0.09 – 0.25% v/v
total product (0.11 – 0.32 fl. oz. per gallon of detergent use solution) to aid in the removal of
soils. All food contact surfaces treated with this boosted detergent must be rinsed thoroughly with
a potable water rinse after use. Consult membrane manufacturer for membrane compatibility
guidelines.
Membrane Cleaning with Ultrasil 740 (Not for use in California)
Prior to this cleaning, remove visible (food) (soil) particles, then wash with a detergent solution,
followed by a potable water rinse. Prepare a solution containing both Oxonia Active and Ultrasil
740. First, add 1.1 - 1.4 fl. oz. of Ultrasil 740 per gallon of [water] [tap water] [up to 500 ppm hard
water] (0.9 - 1.1% v/v concentration), then add 0.25 - 0.32 fl. oz. of Oxonia Active per gallon of the
Ultrasil 740 solution (0.2 - 0.25% v/v concentration). Temper the solution to a minimum of (43 °C)
(110 °F) and apply to the membrane by circulation for at least 5 minutes. Drain the solution from
the membrane and rinse the membrane thoroughly with water.
Ultrasil 740 can also be used as a CIP acid for high Temperature Equipment.
Note: Observe the recommendations of the membrane manufacturers for maximum temperature,
pH and time limits.

RECIRCULATING COOLING WATER SYSTEMS AND HEAT TRANSFER SYSTEMS
Examples of heat transfer systems are Evaporative Condensers, Hydrostatic Sterilizers and
Retorts, Cooling Canals, Pasteurizers, Tunnel Coolers and Warmers, Closed and Once Through
Cooling Systems and COW Water Systems. For control of slime-forming bacteria, algae and fungi
in recirculating cooling water systems add Oxonia Active to the tower basin, distribution box or
some other point to insure uniform mixing. For heat transfer systems, the product should be added
to the system at a point of uniform mixing such as a basin area, sump area or other reservoir or
collecting area from which the treated water will be circulated uniformly throughout the system.
INTERMITTENT OR SLUG METHOD
Initial Dose: When the system is noticeably fouled, apply 150 - (600) (1800) ppm Oxonia Active
(1.25 - (5.0) (15) pounds per 1,000 gallons of water in the system) weekly or as needed to
maintain control. Badly fouled systems must be cleaned before treatment is begun.
Subsequent Dose: After microbial control is evident, add 75 - 300 ppm Oxonia Active (0.62 - 2.5
pounds per 1,000 gallons of water in the system) weekly or as needed to maintain microbial
control. Badly fouled systems must be cleaned before treatment is begun.
CONTINUOUS FEED METHOD
Initial Dose: When the system is noticeably fouled apply 150 - (600) (1800) ppm Oxonia Active
(1.25 - (5.0) (15) pounds per 1,000 gallons of water in the system) weekly or as needed to
maintain control. Badly fouled systems must be cleaned before treatment is begun.
Subsequent Dose: Maintain this treatment level by starting a continuous feed of 60 - 240 ppm
Oxonia Active (0.5 - 2.0 pounds per 1,000 gallons of makeup water added to the system). Badly
fouled systems must be cleaned before treatment is begun.
DAIRY SWEETWATER SYSTEMS
For control of slime-forming bacteria, algae and fungi in dairy sweetwater systems add Oxonia
Active to the system at a point of uniform mixing such as a basin area, sump area or other reservoir
or collecting area from which the treated water will be circulated uniformly throughout the system.
(Meets the criteria in Appendix F of the Grade “A” Pasteurized Milk Ordinance)

FOGGING – NON-PUBLIC HEALTH
(This product can be applied by fogging to control the growth of non-public health spoilage
and decay causing bacteria on hard, non-porous surfaces in [dairies], [beverage], [dietary
supplement], [cosmetics], [pharmaceutical] and [food] processing plants [including meat
and poultry processing facilities]. All surfaces must be pre-cleaned prior to fogging.)
[Pharmaceutical] and [Food] Processing Plants (including meat and poultry processing
facilities)):
Prior to fogging, food products and packaging material must be removed from the room or carefully
protected. The room or building must be vacant of all personnel during and at least two hours after
the fogging treatment. Calculate volume of the room to determine volume of solution needed to fog
(one quart per 1000 cu. ft. of room area). Prepare a solution containing 1.0 - 1.4 fl. oz. per 4 gallons
of [water] [tap water] [up to 500 ppm hard water] (0.20 - 0.28% v/v concentration) and fog using a
mechanical fogging apparatus. Fog product for length of time necessary to fill room based on
fogging apparatus manufacturer directions. Surfaces must remain undisturbed for 5 minutes [after
room fill is achieved] before initiating aeration of the room.
Do not enter the treated area for a minimum of 2 hours [or 8 air exchanges (ACH)] after fogging is
completed. If the room or building must be entered prior to complete aeration, the individual must
wear a self-contained particulate respirator approved by NIOSH/MSHA, goggles, long sleeves, and
long pants.
The fog generated is irritating to the eyes, skin and mucous membranes. Wear a respirator when
mixing the use solution and pouring it into the mechanical fogging apparatus. All food contact
surfaces must be thoroughly rinsed with potable water prior to sanitizing with an EPA approved
food contact sanitizer.

To Pre-clean Instruments Prior to Terminal Sterilization/High Level Disinfection: Apply this
product diluted (3 fl. oz. per 1 gallon of water) (3 fl. oz. per 128 fl. oz. of [water] [tap water] [up to
500 ppm hard water]) (23 milliliters per 1 liter of water) and wipe clean [with a dry paper towel or

paper towel or lint-free cloth or microfiber cloth or sponge.] For stubborn stains or visibly soiled
areas or tougher jobs, allow product to penetrate [dirt and/or soap scum] before wiping.
To Disinfect Non-Critical, Pre-cleaned Instruments: Instruments must be thoroughly pre-
cleaned to remove visible organic debris, rinsed, and rough dried. Clean and rinse lumens of
hollow instruments before filling with this product. Fully immerse or thoroughly wet instruments in 3
fl. oz. Oxonia Active per gallon of [water] [tap water] [up to 500 ppm hard water]. Allow to remain
visibly wet for listed contact time. [To kill TB and Poliovirus, let stand for 10 minutes at room
temperature.] Wipe with a clean, damp cloth or paper towel and allow to air dry.
This product is not to be used as a terminal sterilant/high level disinfectant on any surface or
instrument that (1) is introduced directly into the human body, either into or in contact with the
bloodstream, or normally sterile areas of the body, or (2) contacts intact mucous membranes, but
which does not ordinarily penetrate the blood barrier or otherwise enter normally sterile areas of the
body. This product may be used to pre-clean or decontaminate critical or semi-critical medical
devices prior to sterilization or high level disinfection.
BIOFILM DISINFECTION
Disinfection of Biofilm on Hard, Non-Porous Surfaces: When applied to pre-cleaned hard, non-
porous, non-food contact surfaces conducive to biofilm formation, Oxonia Active is effective as a
biofilm disinfectant against Pseudomonas aeruginosa (ATCC 15442) and Staphylococcus aureus
(ATCC 6538). Use a cleaning solution suitable to remove visible particles and rinse with potable
water. Disinfect with a concentration of 3 fl. oz. of product per gallon of [water] [tap water] [up to
500 ppm hard water]. Apply use solution using a cloth, mop, sponge, coarse sprayer, or by
immersion. All surfaces must be exposed to the solution for a period of not less than 10 minutes at
30°C. Drain thoroughly and allow to air dry. No rinse necessary.
Disinfection of Biofilm on Pre-Cleaned Instruments:
Oxonia Active can be used to kill bacteria in a biofilm (Pseudomonas aeruginosa and
Staphylococcus aureus) on pre-cleaned hard non-porous surfaces of [reusable] non-critical, semi-
critical, and critical stainless steel instruments [(not for use on flexible or semi-rigid endoscopes
unless recommended by the instrument manufacturer)].
Reusable surgical instruments must be thoroughly cleaned and free of visible soil before
treatment. Fully immerse or thoroughly wet instruments in 3 fl. oz. Oxonia Active per gallon of
[water] [tap water] [up to 500 ppm hard water]. For hollow instruments, clean and rinse lumens
prior to filling with Oxonia Active. Allow to remain wet for 10 minutes at 30°C. Remove and
thoroughly rinse instruments.
DISINFECTION OF PHARMACEUTICAL AND COSMETIC SURFACES
Oxonia Active is recommended for use on hard, non-porous, environmental surfaces such as
floors, walls and processing equipment in pharmaceutical and cosmetic processing facilities.

SPECIAL INSTRUCTIONS FOR CLEANING PRIOR TO DISINFECTION AGAINST
[Clostridioides difficile (formerly known as] Clostridium difficile SPORES
Personal Protection: Wear appropriate barrier protection such as gloves, gowns, masks or eye
covering.
Cleaning Procedure: Fecal matter/waste must be thoroughly cleaned from surfaces/objects before
disinfection by application with a clean cloth, mop, and/or sponge saturated with the disinfectant
product. This cleaning may be accomplished with any cleaning solution, including this product.
Cleaning is to include vigorous wiping and/or scrubbing, until all visible soil is removed. Special
attention is needed for high-touch surfaces. Surfaces in patient rooms are to be cleaned in an
appropriate manner, such as from right to left or left to right, on horizontal surfaces, and top to
bottom, on vertical surfaces, to minimize spreading of the spores. Restrooms are to be cleaned
last. Do not reuse soiled cloths.
Infectious Materials Disposal: Materials used in the cleaning process that may contain
feces/wastes are to be disposed of immediately in accordance with local regulations for infectious
materials disposal.
DISINFECTANT WITH SPORICIDAL ACTIVITY
[Clostridioides difficile (formerly known as] Clostridium difficile)
When applied to pre-cleaned surfaces, this product kills and/or inactivates spores of [Clostridioides
difficile (formerly known as] Clostridium difficile) on hard, non-porous surfaces. This product is
effective against C. difficile endospores when diluted at 3 fl. oz. per gallon after a 5 minute contact
time. Treated surface must remain visibly wet for entire contact time.
FUNGICIDAL
This product is a one-step fungicide when diluted at 3 fl. oz. per gallon of [water] [tap water] [up to
500 ppm hard water]. This product kills Candida albicans after a contact time of 3 minutes, and
Trichophyton interdigitale (formerly Trichophyton mentagrophytes) (the athlete’s foot fungus) after a
contact time of 10 minutes. Treated surface must remain visibly wet for entire contact time. Oxonia
Active can be used in areas such as locker rooms, dressing rooms, shower and bath areas and
exercise facilities.
DISINFECTION AGAINST POULTRY & LIVESTOCK VIRUSES
Oxonia Active is designed for use in animal hospitals, animal laboratories, kennels, pet shops,
zoos, pet animal quarters, poultry premises, poultry hatcheries, and livestock quarters. When used
as directed, Oxonia Active is specifically designed to disinfect, deodorize and clean inanimate,
hard, non-porous surfaces such as walls, floors, sink tops, furniture, operating tables, kennel runs,
cages and feeding and watering equipment. In addition Oxonia Active will deodorize those areas
that are generally hard to keep fresh smelling such as garbage storage areas, empty garbage bins
and cans, and any other areas that are prone to odors caused by microorganisms.
All treated equipment that will contact feed or drinking water must be rinsed with potable water
before reuse. For visibly soiled areas, a pre-cleaning step is required. Prepare a fresh solution for
each use.

DISINFECTION OF POULTRY PREMISES, TRUCKS, COOPS AND CRATES
1. Remove all poultry and feeds from premises, trucks, coops and crates.
2. Remove all litter and droppings from floors, walls and surfaces of facilities occupied or
traversed by poultry.
3. Empty all troughs, racks and other feeding and watering appliances.
4. Thoroughly clean all surfaces with a detergent and rinse with water.
5. Saturate surfaces with a 0.4% - 1.0% (2 fl. oz. / 4 gallons to 5 fl. oz. / 4 gallons of [water] [tap
water] [up to 500 ppm hard water]) solution of Oxonia Active for a period of 10 minutes.
6. Ventilate buildings, coops and other closed spaces. Do not house poultry or employ
equipment until treatment has been absorbed, set or dried.
7. Thoroughly scrub treated feed racks, troughs, automatic feeders, fountains and waterers with a
detergent and rinse with potable water before reuse.

DANGER: CORROSIVE. Causes irreversible eye damage and skin burns. May be fatal if inhaled.
Harmful if swallowed. Do not get in eyes, on skin or on clothing. Do not breathe vapor or spray

number prefix TC-84A.

contact lenses, if present, after the first 5 minutes, then continue rinsing eye. Call a poison control
center or doctor for treatment advice.

IF ON SKIN OR CLOTHING: Take off contaminated clothing. Rinse skin immediately with plenty
of water for 15-20 minutes. Call a poison control center or doctor for treatment advice.
IF INHALED: Move person to fresh air. If person is not breathing, call 911 or an ambulance and
then give artificial respiration, preferably mouth-to-mouth, if possible. Call a poison control center
or doctor for further treatment advice.
IF SWALLOWED: Call a poison control center or doctor immediately for treatment advice. Have
person sip a glass of water if able to swallow. Do not induce vomiting unless told to do so by the
poison control center or doctor. Do not give anything by mouth to an unconscious person.
Have the product container or label with you when calling a poison control center or going for
treatment.

Creamic is a mild abrasive cleanser with superior cleaning action.
Excellent for removing stubborn stains, soap scum build-ups, grease and
numerous other tough cleaning jobs. Safe for use on plastic, ceramics,
formica, vinyl, aluminum, stainless steel and other surfaces not harmed
by abrasive cleaners.
en.usage:
Apply Creamic directly on surface or on sponge, damp cloth or brush.
Loosen soil with rubbing action. Then wipe clean or rinse with clean
water.
For emergency medical information call Ecolab: 001 1 651 222 5352

en.properties:
Front Court is a one-part water-dispersed acrylic / polyurethane finish.
Protect the wooden surface from scratch marks while maintaining its
natural look. It is the perfect formula for keeping your wood floors looking
great and environmentally safe with less work, saving time and labor.
It is perfect to use on any new or newly sanded / screened wood floor.
- Easy application
- Quick drying formula saves time
- Durable and non-slip results
en.usage:
With its self-leveling formula, Front Court is so easy to apply. Clean
floor with Ecolab floor cleaner first, use clean flat mop to evenly spread
the finish onto the floor without streaks. It should be applied 3 coats of
Front Court. The total drying time for the floor was 2 hours.
For emergency medical information call Ecolab: 001 1 651 222 5352

vi.properties:
Front Court là lớp kep phủ có phần gốc nước và phối trộn acrylic /
polyurethane. Bảo vệ bề mặt gỗ khỏi các vết xước trong khi vẫn giữ
được vẻ tự nhiên. Đây là công thức hoàn hảo để giữ cho sàn gỗ của bạn
trông tuyệt đẹp và an toàn với môi trường với việc bảo trì ít hơn, tiết
kiệm thời gian và nhân công.
Là giải pháp hoàn hảo để sử dụng trên các sàn gỗ mới hoặc mới được
chà nhám / đánh bóng.
ÍCH LỢI
- Dễ thi công
- Khô nhanh tiết kiệm thời gian
- Bền bỉ và không trơn trượt
vi.usage:
Với công thức tự làm phẵng bề mặt, Front Court rất dễ thi công. Trước
tiên hãy làm sạch sàn bằng nước lau sàn Ecolab, dùng cây lau loại
phẳng sạch để phủ đều lớp keo lên sàn để không để lại vệt. Nên phủ 3
lớp Front Court. Tổng thời gian để khô sàn là 2 giờ.
Để biết thông tin trở giúp y tế khẩn cấp, hãy gọi Ecolab: 001 800 13 203 9987
Tham khảo ý kiến Đại diện Ecolab của bạn để biết hướng dẫn sử dụng cụ thể và thiết bị pha chế được
khuyến nghị. Để biết thông tin về cách cảnh báo và sơ cứu, vui lòng tham khảo Bảng dữ liệu an toàn
(SDS) hoặc nhãn sản phẩm.

en.properties:
Jusmin Flesh is one-step cleaner, disinfectant and deodorizer with mild
jasmine fragrance. Suitable for hospitals, healthcare facilities and office
buildings. It can be used on all hard surfaces - floors, walls, sinks and
countertops.
en.usage:
For daily mopping: mix 1 part of Jusmin Flesh per 60-120 parts of
water depending on soil levels. Wet and clean surfaces thoroughly with
mop, cloth, sponge or brush. Rinse with clean water or wipe with a clean
cloth or sponge.
For sanitizing: mix 1 part of Jusmin Flesh per 30 parts of water
depending on soil levels. Wet and clean surfaces thoroughly with mop,
cloth, sponge or brush. Rinse with clean water or wipe with a clean cloth
or sponge.
For cleaning heavy soils: mix 1 part of Jusmin Flesh per 7 parts of
water. Wet and clean surfaces thoroughly with mop, cloth, sponge or
brush. Rinse with clean water or wipe with a clean cloth or sponge.
For hospital disinfection: mix 1 part of Jusmin Flesh per 7 parts of
water. Wet and clean surfaces thoroughly with mop, cloth, sponge or
brush and allow to remain wet for at least 10 minutes. Rinse with clean
water or wipe with a clean cloth or sponge.
For emergency medical information call Ecolab: 001 1 651 222 5352

vi.properties:
Jusmin Flesh là sản phẩm kết hợp cùng một lúc làm vệ sinh, khử trùng
và khử mùi với hương hoa nhài dịu nhẹ. Thích hợp cho bệnh viện, cơ sở
y tế và cao ốc văn phòng. Nó có thể được sử dụng trên tất cả các bề
mặt cứng - sàn, tường, bồn rửa và mặt bàn.
vi.usage:
Để lau sàn hàng ngày: pha 1 phần Jusmin Flesh với 60-120 tuỳ theo
mức độ vết bẩn. Làm ướt và lau sạch sàn bằng cây lau sàn, khăn,
miếng bọt biển hoặc bàn chải. Xả lại với nước sạch hoặc lau lại bằng
khăn sạch hoặc bọt biển.
Để khử trùng: pha 1 phần Jusmin Flesh với 30 tuỳ theo mức độ vết
bẩn. Làm ướt và lau sạch sàn bằng cây lau sàn, khăn, miếng bọt biển
hoặc bàn chải. Xả lại với nước sạch hoặc lau lại bằng khăn sạch hoặc
bọt biển.
Để làm sạch vết bẩn nặng: pha 1 phần Jusmin Flesh với 7 phần
nước. Làm ướt và lau sạch sàn bằng cây lau sàn, khăn, miếng bọt biển
hoặc bàn chải. Xả lại với nước sạch hoặc lau lại bằng khăn sạch hoặc
bọt biển.
Để khử trùng bệnh viện: pha 1 phần Jusmin Flesh với 7 phần nước.
Làm ướt và lau sạch sàn bằng cây lau sàn, khăn, miếng bọt biển hoặc
bàn chải, cần ngâm dung dịch trên sàn ít nhất 10 phút. Xả lại với nước
sạch hoặc lau lại bằng khăn sạch hoặc bọt biển.
Trong trường hợp khẩn cấp, hãy gọi Ecolab: 001 800 13 203 9987
Hãy yêu cầu tư vấn từ Đại diện Ecolab khi cần bất cứ thông tin gì về hướng dẫn sử dụng và thiết bị

sản phẩm.

en.properties:
Gemstar Laser is an ultra-durable gloss floor finish designed for high
traffic area and extremely resistant to black heel marks, scratching and
scuffing. Ease of maintenance and suitable for supermarkets and large
areas. It provides an ideal finish for users of ultra-high speed
maintenance techniques.
en.usage:
Full Strip Preparation: Strip the floor with Histrip ES stripper at
recommended use dilution. Rinse well and let dry.
Scrub and Recoat Preparation: Deep scrub with an Ecolab neutral or
all purpose cleaner using a green or blue pad. Rinse and let dry.
Application: Gemstar Laser may be applied in either thin, medium or
heavy coats, depending on the application technique.
Coverage: 185 to 371 m2 / 1 gallon.
Maintenance: Dust mop daily. Autoscrub or damp mop with an Ecolab
neutral cleaner. If desired, periodically spray buff with Low and Behold
with a combination synthetic/natural blend pad.
For emergency medical information call Ecolab: 001 1 651 222 5352

vi.properties:
Gemstar Laser là sản phẩm keo phủ sàn bóng siêu bền được thiết kế
cho khu vực đi lại đông người và có khả năng chống bám các vết đen do
giầy cao gót, trầy xước và bong tróc cực kỳ hiệu quả. Dễ dàng bảo trì và
thích hợp cho các siêu thị và diện tích lớn. Cung cấp một giải pháp bảo
vệ sàn lý tưởng cho người sử dụng ở các khu vực đòi hỏi kỷ thuật bảo
trì cao.
vi.usage:
Chuẩn Bị Bóc Keo Củ: Dùng chất bóc keo sàn Histrip ES pha loãng
với nước theo tỉ lệ được khuyến nghị.
Bóc Keo: Dùng máy chà sàn và chất tẩy bóc keo của Ecolab, sử dụng
miếng pad màu xanh lá cây hoặc đỏ. Xả nước sạch và để khô.
Phủ Lại: Gemstar Laser có thể được phủ mỏng, trung bình hoặc dày,
tùy thuộc vào kỹ thuật khi phủ.
Độ phủ: 185 đến 371 m2 / 1 gallon.
Bảo dưỡng: Lau bụi hàng ngày. Dùng máy chà sàn tự động hoặc lau
ẩm bằng chất tẩy rửa trung tính Ecolab. Nếu muốn, định kỳ đánh bóng
lại với Recovery Spray Buff và pad sợi tự nhiên hoặc nhân tạo.
Để biết thông tin trở giúp y tế khẩn cấp, hãy gọi Ecolab: 001 800 13 203 9987
Tham khảo ý kiến Đại diện Ecolab của bạn để biết hướng dẫn sử dụng cụ thể và thiết bị pha chế được
khuyến nghị. Để biết thông tin về cách cảnh báo và sơ cứu, vui lòng tham khảo Bảng dữ liệu an toàn
(SDS) hoặc nhãn sản phẩm.

en.properties:
Deep Gloss is a water-based furniture polish, efficiently removes dirt
and fingerprint and polishes all kind of washable surface such as
stainless steel, metal, wood, ceramic tile, vinyl, leather and equipment.
For repeated use of Deep Gloss, the surface will be easily to clean and
stay last longer.
Caution: Do not apply Deep Gloss on the floor since it causes
slippery.
en.usage:
Deep Gloss is a ready to use product.
1. Fill spray-bottles with Deep Gloss.
2. Thoroughly spray Deep Gloss 2-3 times, from a distance of 8 inches
onto area to be cleaned.
3. Wipe immediately with clean dry cloth do not let Deep Gloss dry,
and wipe again until shiny.
For emergency medical information call Ecolab: 001 1 651 222 5352

vi.usage:
Deep Gloss là sản phẩm không cần pha loãng.
1. Cho Deep Gloss vào bình xịt.
2. Xịt Deep Gloss 2-3 lần, từ khoảng cách 20 cm tới bề mặt cần vệ
sinh.
3. Dùng khăn khô sạch lau ngay lập tức, không để Deep Gloss bị khô,
tiếp tục lau cho tới khi sáng bóng.
Trong trường hợp khẩn cấp, hãy gọi Ecolab: 001 800 13 203 9987
Hãy yêu cầu tư vấn từ Đại diện Ecolab khi cần bất cứ thông tin gì về hướng dẫn sử dụng và thiết bị
bơm pha cần thiết. Về cảnh báo và thông tin sơ cứu, vui lòng xem Safety Data Sheet (SDS) hoặc nhãn
sản phẩm.

en.properties:
Histrip ES is an alkaline stripper designed to easily remove old floor
finish and heavy soils. Effective on all floor finishes - vinyl, rubber tile,
marble and terrazzo except wood floor.
en.usage:
1. Dilute 1 part of Histrip ES with 4 parts of water.
2. Apply diluted Histrip ES liberally with mop. Make sure entire surface
of the floor is thoroughly wet.
3. Allow solution to work for 15 minutes (Do not allow solution to dry).
4. Machine scrub with appropriate pad, ensuring even agitation, pick up
a solution with a wet vac, auto scrubber or mop.
5. Rinse the floor 2-3 times with clean water and allow to dry before
applying floor finish.
For emergency medical information call Ecolab: 001 1 651 222 5352

vi.properties:
Histrip ES là dung dịch bóc keo và tẩy sàn gốc kiềm được thiết kế để dễ
dàng loại bỏ lớp keo trên sàn cũ và các vết bẩn nặng. Hiệu quả trên tất
cả các loại sàn đã phủ keo như vinyl, gạch cao su, đá cẩm thạch và đá
mài, ngoại trừ sàn gỗ
vi.usage:
1. Pha 1 phần Histrip ES với 4 phần nước.
2. Dùng cây lau sàn phủ dung dịch Histrip ES đã pha lên sàn, tán dung
dịch đều ra sàn. Đảm bảo toàn bộ sàn đều ướt hoàn toàn.
3. Để dung dịch trên sàn khoảng 15 phút (KHÔNG để sàn khô). Dùng
máy chà sàn với pad phù hợp, đảm bảo đánh sàn đều tay, dùng máy
hút, máy liên hợp hoặc cây lau để dọn sạch chất bẩn trên sàn.
4. Xả lại từ 2-3 lần với nước sạch, để khô trước khi phủ keo hoàn thiện
sàn.
Trong trường hợp khẩn cấp, hãy gọi Ecolab: 001 800 13 203 9987
Hãy yêu cầu tư vấn từ Đại diện Ecolab khi cần bất cứ thông tin gì về hướng dẫn sử dụng và thiết bị
bơm pha cần thiết. Về cảnh báo và thông tin sơ cứu, vui lòng xem Safety Data Sheet (SDS) hoặc nhãn
sản phẩm.

en.properties:
Base Kote is an acrylic base sealer to provide great adhesion to new
and aged concrete, terrazzo, marble and other stone floors. It is durable
and easy to maintain. Exhibited outstanding water and stain resistance to
protect stone floors from discoloration caused by spills.
en.usage:
1. Strip with Histrip ES stripper at recommended use dilutions.
Rinse at least twice with clean water and let dry.
2. Apply Base Kote with the clean mop. Let dry thoroughly, usually
30 minutes. One coat is sufficient except for porous floors where an
additional coat will be required.
For emergency medical information call Ecolab: 001 1 651 222 5352

vi.usage:
1. Bóc tẩy với sản phẩm chuyên dụng như Histrip ES theo tỉ lệ pha
khuyến cáo. Tráng ít nhất 2 lần với nước sạch và để khô.
2. Dùng Base Kote với cây lau sạch. Phủ xong để khô hoàn toàn,
thường mất khoảng 30 phút. Chỉ cần một lớp phủ là đủ. Ngoại trừ
loại sàn hút nước nhiều, cần phủ thêm một lớp nữa.
Trong trường hợp khẩn cấp, hãy gọi Ecolab: 001 800 13 203 9987
Hãy yêu cầu tư vấn từ Đại diện Ecolab khi cần bất cứ thông tin gì về hướng dẫn sử dụng và thiết bị
bơm pha cần thiết. Về cảnh báo và thông tin sơ cứu, vui lòng xem Safety Data Sheet (SDS) hoặc nhãn
sản phẩm.

en.properties:
KleenCare is a special liquid hand wash for foodservices’ hands sanitation,
reduce risk of foodborne illness transmitted by the hands. Mild and effective
formula moisturizes, encourages repeat hand washing. Ideal for use at
employee restroom and kitchen hand washing sinks.
en.usage:
1. Wet hands and arms half way to the elbows with warm water.
2. Put a palmful of KleenCare into your hands.
3. Wash vigorously for at least 20 seconds.
Make sure you clean between your fingers and above your wrist.
The use of a nail brush is recommended.
4. Rinse off – remove all traces of soap.
5. Dry hands with clean cloth or paper towels.
For emergency medical information call Ecolab: 001 1 651 222 5352

vi.properties:
KleenCare là xà phòng rửa tay đặt biệt sử dụng trong dịch vụ ẩm thực,
giảm nguy cơ gây ngộ độc thực phẩm lây truyền qua tay. Công thức dịu
nhẹ và hiệu quả giúp dưỡng ẩm, khuyến khích việc rửa tay thường
xuyên. Lý tưởng để sử dụng trong khu vực vệ sinh của nhân viên và bồn
rửa tay trong bếp.
vi.usage:
1. Làm ướt bàn tay và cánh tay cho đến khủy tay bằng nước ấm.
2. Cho một lượng đầy KleenCare vào lòng bàn tay.
3. Rửa kỹ trong ít nhất 20 giây. Đảm bảo làm sạch giữa các ngón tay và
phía trên cổ tay. Khuyến khích sử dụng bàn chải chà móng tay.
4. Xả nước – cho sạch hết xà phòng.
5. Làm khô tay với khăn sạch hoặc bằng khăn giấy.
Để biết thông tin y tế khẩn cấp, hãy gọi Ecolab: 001 800 13 203 9987
Tham khảo ý kiến Đại Diện của Ecolab để hướng dẫn sử dụng cụ thể và thiết bị pha chế được khuyến
nghị. Để biết thêm thông tin về cảnh báo và sơ cứu, tham khảo Bảng Dữ Liệu An Toàn Hóa chất (MSDS)
hoặc trên nhãn của sản phẩm.

en.properties:
Future DC is one-step cleaner and disinfectant designed for floors, walls
and sanitary wares. Provides excellent detergent action for grease, soap
scum and other difficult soils, leaves no sticky and dulling film. Low foam
en.usage:
For disinfectant and deep cleaning: mix 1 part of Future DC per
7-18 parts of water depending on soil levels. Wet and clean surfaces
thoroughly with mop, cloth, sponge or brush and allow to remain wet for
at least 10 minutes. Rinse with clean water or wipe with a clean cloth or
sponge.
For heavy soil cleaning: mix 1 part of Future DC per 40 parts of water.
Wet and clean surfaces thoroughly with mop, cloth, sponge or brush.
Rinse with clean water or wipe with a clean cloth or sponge.
For medium soil cleaning: mix 1 part of Future DC per 120 parts of
water. Wet and clean surfaces thoroughly with mop, cloth, sponge or
brush. Rinse with clean water or wipe with a clean cloth or sponge.
For light soil cleaning: mix 1 part of Future DC per 150 parts of water.
Wet and clean surfaces thoroughly with mop, cloth, sponge or brush.
Rinse with clean water or wipe with a clean cloth or sponge.
For automatic scrubber: mix 1 part of Future DC per 200 – 250 parts
of water. Apply solution with automatic scrubber. Rinse with clean water
or wipe with a clean cloth or sponge.
For emergency medical information call Ecolab: 001 1 651 222 5352

vi.properties:
Future DC là dung dịch vệ sinh và khử trùng kết hợp trong cùng một sản
phẩm, được thiết kế vệ sinh sàn, tường và thiết bị phòng vệ sinh. Có tác
dụng tẩy rửa tuyệt vời đối với dầu mỡ, cặn xà phòng và các loại vết bẩn
khó rửa khác, không để lại màng dính và ố màu. Đặc tính ít bọt giúp tăng
hiệu quả làm sạch.
vi.usage:
Để khử trùng và tổng vệ sinh: pha tỉ lệ 1 phần Future DC với
7-18 phần nước tuỳ theo mức độ vết bẩn. Làm ướt và lau sạch bề mặt
bằng cây lau, khăn, miếng bọt biển hoặc bàn chải. Cần ngâm dung dịch
trên bề mặt ít nhất 10 phút. Xả lại với nước sạch hoặc lau lại với khăn
sạch hoặc bọt biển.
Để làm sạch vết bẩn nặng: pha tỉ lệ 1 phần Future DC với 40 phần
nước. Làm ướt và lau sạch bề mặt bằng cây lau, khăn, miếng bọt biển
hoặc bàn chải. Xả lại với nước sạch hoặc lau lại với khăn sạch hoặc bọt
biển.
Để làm sạch vết bẩn trung bình: pha tỉ lệ 1 phần Future DC với 120
phần nước. Làm ướt và lau sạch bề mặt bằng cây lau, khăn, miếng bọt
biển hoặc bàn chải. Xả lại với nước sạch hoặc lau lại với khăn sạch
hoặc bọt biển.
Để làm sạch vất bẩn nhẹ: pha tỉ lệ 1 phần Future DC với 150 phần
nước. Làm ướt và lau sạch bề mặt bằng cây lau, khăn, miếng bọt biển
hoặc bàn chải. Xả lại với nước sạch hoặc lau lại với khăn sạch hoặc bọt
biển.
Dùng cho máy chà sàn liên hợp: pha tỉ lệ 1 phần Future DC với 200 –
250 phần nước. Sử dụng máy với dung dịch đã pha. Xả lại với nước
sạch hoặc lau lại với khăn sạch hoặc bọt biển.
Trong trường hợp khẩn cấp, hãy gọi Ecolab: 001 800 13 203 9987
Hãy yêu cầu tư vấn từ Đại diện Ecolab khi cần bất cứ thông tin gì về hướng dẫn sử dụng và thiết bị
bơm pha cần thiết. Về cảnh báo và thông tin sơ cứu, vui lòng xem Safety Data Sheet (SDS) hoặc nhãn
sản phẩm.

en.properties:
Mop Dressing-A is a liquid dust mop and dust cloth treatment to
eliminate rising, swirling dust during cleaning applications. Easily and
quickly remove dust. Treatment with Mop Dressing-A helps prolong the
life of floors, furniture and other surfaces without leaving an oily film.
en.usage:
For Treating Dust Mop: Thoroughly spray Mop Dressing-A onto dust
mop from a distance of about 6 inches, allow the dust mop to completely
dry before use. The dust mop should NOT be damp or wet when used.
After used, brush out and shake dust mop clean over trash can or inside
a bag. Always hang dust mop with yarn facing away from walls.
For Dust Cloths: Thoroughly spray Mop Dressing-A onto dust cloth
and rub over the entire surfaces, then polish with a second cloth to yield
a hard, clean surface.
For emergency medical information call Ecolab: 001 1 651 222 5352

vi.properties:
Mop Dressing-A là chất lau bụi dùng với cây lau bụi khô hoặc khăn khô;
dùng để xử lý các loại bụi nhẹ, bị cuốn lên khi thi công làm sạch. Dễ
dàng và nhanh chóng loại bỏ bụi nhẹ. Ứng dụng Mop Dressing-A giúp
kéo dài tuổi thọ của sàn, đồ đạc và các bề mặt khác mà không để lại
màng dầu.
vi.usage:
Xử dụng với cây lau bụi: Xịt kĩ Mop Dressing-A lên cây lau bụi từ
khoảng cách khoảng 15 cm, để cây lau bụi khô hoàn toàn trước khi sử
dụng. Cây lau bụi KHÔNG được ẩm hoặc ướt khi sử dụng. Sau khi sử
dụng, quét sạch và giũ bụi vào thùng rác hoặc vào túi rác. Luôn treo cây
lau bụi hướng mặt giẻ lau ra ngoài tường.
Xử dụng lau bụi bằng khăn: Xịt kĩ Mop Dressing-A lên khăn khô và
chà lên toàn bộ bề mặt cần lau, sau đó đánh bóng bề mặt đó bằng khăn
khô thứ hai để tạo độ cứng và sạch.
Trong trường hợp khẩn cấp, hãy gọi Ecolab: 001 800 13 203 9987
Hãy yêu cầu tư vấn từ Đại diện Ecolab khi cần bất cứ thông tin gì về hướng dẫn sử dụng và thiết bị
bơm pha cần thiết. Về cảnh báo và thông tin sơ cứu, vui lòng xem Safety Data Sheet (SDS) hoặc nhãn
sản phẩm.

en.properties:
Floordress R 600 is a neutral general cleaner. It can be used on all
types of floors and floor finished to remove stain and dirt for a high shine
surfaces.
- Suitable for general cleaning of all kind of floors, especially waxed
floors
- Neutral and gentle to skin
- Contains solvent that helps clean stubborn floor stains
- Thoroughly cleans all surfaces and retains the shine
en.usage:
For heavy soil:
Dilute Floordress R 600 with water at ratio 1:40 and mop on the surface.
Rinse with clean water.
For medium soil:
Dilute Floordress R 600 with water at ratio 1:100 and mop on the
surface. Rinse with clean water.
For light soil:
Dilute Floordress R 600 with water at ratio 1:150 and mop on the
surface. Rinse with clean water.
For automatic scrubber:
Dilute Floordress R 600 with water at ratio 1:200-250 and mop on the
surface. Apply solution with automatic scrubber. Rinse with clean water.
For emergency medical information call Ecolab: 001 1 651 222 5352

vi.properties:
Floordress R 600 là nước lau sàn đa năng trung tính. Có thể được sử
dụng trên tất cả các loại sàn và sàn phủ keo để loại bỏ vết ố và bụi bẩn
làm cho bề mặt rất sáng bóng.
- Thích hợp cho tất cả các loại sàn, đặc biệt là các loại sàn đã phủ sáp
- Trung tính và không làm khô da
- Chứa dung môi giúp làm sạch các vết bẩn nặng trên sàn
- Làm sạch triệt để mọi bề mặt sàn và giữ được độ sáng bóng
vi.usage:
Đối với bẩn nặng: Pha loãng Floordress R 600 với nước theo tỷ lệ 1:40
và lau trên bề mặt. Xả lại bằng nước sạch.
Đối với bẩn vừa: Pha loãng Floordress R 600 với nước theo tỷ lệ 1:100
và lau trên bề mặt. Xả lại bằng nước sạch.
Đối với bẩn nhẹ: Pha loãng Floordress R 600 với nước theo tỷ lệ 1:150
và lau trên bề mặt. Xả lại bằng nước sạch.
Đối với máy chà sàn tự động: Pha loãng Floordress R 600 với nước
theo tỷ lệ 1: 200-250. Dùng với máy chà sàn tự động. Xả lại bằng nước
sạch
Để biết thông tin trở giúp y tế khẩn cấp, hãy gọi Ecolab: 001 800 13 203 9987
Tham khảo ý kiến Đại diện Ecolab của bạn để biết hướng dẫn sử dụng cụ thể và thiết bị pha chế được
khuyến nghị. Để biết thông tin về cách cảnh báo và sơ cứu, vui lòng tham khảo Bảng dữ liệu an toàn
(SDS) hoặc nhãn sản phẩm.

en.properties:
Sanigard is a heavy duty bathroom cleaner with hydrochloric acid
formula quickly removes stubborn rust, lime, soap scum and uric acid
deposits. Designed for cleaning on wall, sinks, toilet bowls and other
sanitary wares.
DO NOT use on any surfaces that can be damaged by acidic material
such as marble and aluminum.
en.usage:
DO NOT pour water into Sanigard.
Use rubber gloves, rubber shoes when using this product.
For General Cleaning: dilute 1 part of Sanigard with 3 parts of water.
Pour or spray diluted solution into surfaces to be cleaned and let it stand
a few minutes. Scrub with brush, sponge or wet cloth to loosen the soil.
Rinse with clean water and wipe dry.
For Rust or Heavy Stains: dilute 1 part of Sanigard with 2 parts of
water. Pour of spray diluted solution into surfaces to be cleaned. Scrub
with brush.
For emergency medical information call Ecolab: 001 1 651 222 5352

vi.properties:
Sanigard là chất tẩy rửa nhà vệ sinh gốc axit hydrochloric giúp tẩy bỏ
nhanh chóng vết gỉ sét, cặn vôi, cặn xà phòng và cặn axit uric bám lâu
ngày. Có thể dùng để tẩy rửa tường, bồn rửa, bồn cầu và các thiết bị vệ
sinh khác.
KHÔNG dùng cho các bề mặt nhạy cảm với axit như đá cẩm thạch và
nhôm.
vi.usage:
KHÔNG đổ nước vào Sanigard khi pha loãng.
Cần dùng găng tay cao su, ủng cao su khi sử dụng sản phẩm này.
Để Vệ Sinh Hàng Ngày: pha 1 phần Sanigard vào 39 phần nước. Đổ
hoặc xịt dung dịch đã pha lên bề mặt cần làm sạch rồi ngâm trong ít
phút. Chà bằng bàn chải, bọt biển hoặc khăn ướt để làm mềm vết bẩn.
Xả lại với nước sạch rồi lau khô.
Để Tẩy Gỉ Sét Hoặc Vết Bẩn Nặng: pha 1 phần Sanigard vào 4 phần
nước. Đổ hoặc xịt dung dịch đã pha lên bề mặt cần làm sạch. Chà kĩ
bằng bàn chải.
Trong trường hợp khẩn cấp, hãy gọi Ecolab: 001 800 13 203 9987
Hãy yêu cầu tư vấn từ Đại diện Ecolab khi cần bất cứ thông tin gì về hướng dẫn sử dụng và thiết bị
bơm pha cần thiết. Về cảnh báo và thông tin sơ cứu, vui lòng xem Safety Data Sheet (SDS) hoặc nhãn
sản phẩm.

en.properties:
Duraglos is an extremely durable ultimate gloss floor finish and
resistance to dirt embedment, black heel marks, scratching, scuffing.
Designed for the high traffic area and ease of maintenance. Suitable to
use on rubber tile, marble, terrazzo and concrete. Designed for
maintenance with high speed buffing or burnishing machine.
en.usage:
1. Strip with Histrip ES stripper at recommended use dilutions. Rinse at
least twice with clean water and let dry.
2. For porous floors, apply Base Kote sealer with a freshly laundered
mop and let dry.
3. Apply Duraglos with a freshly laundered mop. Allow adequate dry
time between coats, usually 30-50 minutes. Various factors are
involved in the drying time, including thickness of coat and
temperature, humidity and ventilation.
4. Apply additional coats if a higher gloss is desired.
For emergency medical information call Ecolab: 001 1 651 222 5352

vi.properties:
Duraglos là keo phủ hoàn thiện sàn tạo độ bóng và cực kì bền; có khả
năng chống bám bụi bẩn, vết đen từ giày cao gót, vềt trầy xước. Được
thiết kế cho khu vực mật độ đi lại cao và dễ bảo trì. Thích hợp sử dụng
trên gạch cao su, đá cẩm thạch, sàn đá mài và bê tông. Được thiết kế để
bảo trì với máy đánh bóng và đánh bóng tốc độ cao.
vi.usage:
1. Bóc tẩy sàn với sản phẩm chuyên dụng Histrip ES theo nồng độ
khuyến cáo. Xả lại ít nhất 2 lần với nước sạch và để khô.
2. Với các loại sàn thấm nước, dùng Base Kote cây lau sàn sạch để
phủ và để khô.
3. Phủ Duraglos bằng cây lau sàn sạch. Cần để sàn thật khô giữa các
lớp phủ, thường 30-50 phút. Các yếu tố ảnh hưởng tới thời gian khô
như độ dày của lớp phủ, nhiệt độ, độ ẩm và độ thoáng gió.
4. Phủ thêm nhiều lớp nếu cần độ sáng bóng hơn.
Trong trường hợp khẩn cấp, hãy gọi Ecolab: 001 800 13 203 9987
Hãy yêu cầu tư vấn từ Đại diện Ecolab khi cần bất cứ thông tin gì về hướng dẫn sử dụng và thiết bị
bơm pha cần thiết. Về cảnh báo và thông tin sơ cứu, vui lòng xem Safety Data Sheet (SDS) hoặc nhãn
sản phẩm.

en.properties:
Paraffin is an oil-based stainless steel polisher. Specially designed to
promote gloss and remove dust. Provides a long-lasting shine that leave
surfaces looking like new.
en.usage:
Paraffin is a ready to use product.
Spray Paraffin on clean dry cloth or area to be cleaned. Wipe with clean
dry cloth until shiny.
For emergency medical information call Ecolab: 001 1 651 222 5352

vi.properties:
Paraffin là chất đánh bóng inox gốc dầu. Được thiết kế đặc biệt để tăng
độ bóng và loại bỏ bụi. Tạo độ sáng bóng lâu dài trên bề mặt; giúp bề
mặt luôn trông như mới.
vi.usage:
Paraffin là sản phẩm không cần pha loãng.
Xịt Paraffin lên khăn khô hoặc bề mặt cần làm sạch. Lau bằng khăn khô
đến khi bề mặt sáng bóng.
Trong trường hợp khẩn cấp, hãy gọi Ecolab: 001 800 13 203 9987
Hãy yêu cầu tư vấn từ Đại diện Ecolab khi cần bất cứ thông tin gì về hướng dẫn sử dụng và thiết bị
bơm pha cần thiết. Về cảnh báo và thông tin sơ cứu, vui lòng xem Safety Data Sheet (SDS) hoặc nhãn
sản phẩm.

en.properties:
Miraglo is a mild, general purpose detergent with drying and evaporating
agents to create streak free results. Designed to clean mirrors, windows
and other glass surfaces.
en.usage:
For light soil cleaning: Apply Miraglo with water at ratio 1:10
For medium soil cleaning: Apply Miraglo with water at ratio 1:5
For heavy soil cleaning: Miraglo is ready to use product.
Spray Miraglo onto the surfaces to be cleaned or apply directly to a
cloth. Wipe from left to right, top to bottom. Squeegee or fold cloth as
needed to clean and dry surfaces.
For emergency medical information call Ecolab: 001 1 651 222 5352

vi.properties:
Miraglo là chất tẩy rửa nhẹ, đa năng bao gồm các hợp chất có tác dụng
làm khô và dễ bay hơi giúp bề mặt không còn vệt sau khi được làm
sạch. Được thiết kế để làm sạch gương, cửa sổ và các bề mặt bằng
kính khác.
vi.usage:
Để làm sạch vết bẩn nhẹ: Pha Miraglo với nước theo tỉ lệ 1:10
Để làm sạch vết bẩn trung bình: Pha Miraglo với nước theo tỉ lệ 1:5
Để làm sạch vết bẩn cứng đầu: Dùng Miraglo không pha.
Xịt Miraglo lên trên bề mặt cần làm sạch hoặc xịt vào khăn sạch. Lau từ
trái sáng phải, trên xuống dưới. Vắt hoặc gấp khăn lại để lau sạch và
làm khô mặt kính.
Trong trường hợp khẩn cấp, hãy gọi Ecolab: 001 800 13 203 9987
Hãy yêu cầu tư vấn từ Đại diện Ecolab khi cần bất cứ thông tin gì về hướng dẫn sử dụng và thiết bị
bơm pha cần thiết. Về cảnh báo và thông tin sơ cứu, vui lòng xem Safety Data Sheet (SDS) hoặc nhãn
sản phẩm.

en.usage:
1.
Remove wrap from product
2. Place product in dispenser
Use only in Ecolab dispenser

1.
Fill your soaking sink or tub with warm water.
Push dispenser button to dispense SMARTPOWER™
Presoak Pot and Pan. Water will turn orange.

Do not rinse.
4. Run the rack through the dishmachine to wash
and sanitise with an EPA registered sanitiser
when chemical is required.
IMPROVED RESULTS:
Without soaking, hard-to-remove soil may require
two to four times through the dishmachine to clean.
SMARTPOWER ™ Presoak Pot and Pan loosens soils,
delivering superior results in one wash.

en.properties:
Ecolab Alcohol Sanitizer is an alcohol-based hand sanitizer with alcohol
contents more than 70% v/v. Ideal for hand cleaning with no rinse required.
Can be used to supplement routine hand washing. Ecolab Alcohol Sanitizer
will reduce micro-organisms on the skin. Able to use after hand washing for
hand hygiene.
Alcohol contents more than 70% v/v
Quickly dry, non rinse
Supplement routine hand washing
en.usage:
FOR HAND CLEANING
1. Hands should be clean and dry.
2. Apply product onto hands undiluted.
3. Massage over back, palm of hands, around ﬁnger nails at least 20 seconds
and let it dry.
HAND SANITIZER

en.properties:
Ecolab Dishmachine Detergent 11 is a concentrated, high-alkaline liquid warewashing
machine detergent. It strips away heavy grease, protein and starch food soils in light,
medium and heavy soil conditions including spotting and streaking on wares.
Concentrated formula delivers sparkling results
Effective on all types of food soils
Safe and efﬁcient in combination with Ecolab dosing equipment
en.usage:
(For warewashing machines only)
Wear rubber gloves while handling product. This product only for mixing and dispensing via
Ecolab dispenser set by Ecolab specialist.
Recommended use dilution is product 1-6 mL : 1L of water (depending on soil level).

en.properties:
Ecolab Delimer 61 is a multi-surface liquid cleaner used for deliming and rust removing
in dishwashing machine, pot and bathroom area.
Dissolves lime scale and rust deposits
For dishwashing machine, pot & bathroom Area
Extends the machines life time and increases washing and rinse efﬁciency - reduction
of energy costs
Saving time & labour
en.usage:
Do not ﬁll water into product container. Rubber gloves must be worn everytime using the
product.
For deliming & rust removing in dish-washing machine
Fill tank with water about 2-3 inches below overﬂow level. Turn on tank heater. Add 1 gallon
of product and run machine until lime scale and rust disappears. Apply full strength where
spray does not reach. Scrape off heavy lime and rust buildup. Drain tank and reﬁll with
fresh water. Run machine again for 5 minutes and drain.
For deliming & rust removing on walls, ﬂoors, shower stalls in bathroom
Dilute product 30 mL : 1 gallon of hot water. Apply to surface and wipe or scrub with cloth
or brush. Allow contact time for 5 minutes then rinse with clean water.
PPE REQUIREMENT:
MULTI-SURFACE DELIMER
FOR EMERGENCY MEDICAL INFORMATION CALL ECOLAB: 001-800-13-203-9987

en.properties:
Nettoclar Rapid is renovation product for all marble and lime stone
floorings e.g. marble, travertine and terrazzo. It is best for easy daily
maintenance cleaning with brilliant shine effect and extremely resistant
resulting surface.
en.usage:
Nettoclar Rapid is a ready to use product.
Pre-conditioning: Before crystallization, heavy-duty cleaning is
necessary with general floor cleaner. Then rinse well and wait until
completely dry.
Crystallization: Always use Nettoclar Rapid in its concentrated form.
Spray Nettoclar Rapid equally, in sections of 2-4 m² each over the
flooring. Use a low speed single disc machine with a steel wool pad and
until the required shine has been reached. The final result is achieved
when the resistance of the machine is tangible. Immediately remove
steel wool residue with a broom or dry mop.
Post treatment: In high traffic areas, a post treatment should be applied.
Polishing and coating is not advisable.
For emergency medical information call Ecolab: 001 1 651 222 5352

vi.properties:
Nettoclar Rapid là sản phẩm được sáng chế cho tất cả các loại sàn đá
cẩm thạch và đá vôi, vd. đá cẩm thạch, travertine và đá mài. Là sản
phẩm tốt nhất để dễ dàng vệ sinh bảo trì hàng ngày với hiệu ứng sáng
bóng rực rỡ và bề mặt chống trầy sướt cực kỳ bền.
vi.usage:
Nettoclar Rapid là sản phẩm sử dụng nguyên chất.
Các chú ý trước khi thi công: Trước khi thi công việc kết tinh sàn đá,
sàn cần được làm sạch cẩn thận với nước lau sàn đa năng. Sau đó xả
sạch và đợi cho đến khi khô hoàn toàn.
Kết tinh mặt đá: Luôn sử dụng Nettoclar Rapid ở dạng đậm đặc. Phun
Nettoclar Rapid đều trên bề mặt, chia các phần 2-4 m². Sử dụng máy
đĩa đơn tốc độ thấp với pad steel wool và cho đến khi đạt được độ sáng
bóng cần thiết. Kết quả cuối cùng hoàn tất khi không còn lực cản của
máy khi di chuyển trên sàn. Loại bỏ ngay bột rơi ra từ pad steel wool
bằng chổi hoặc cây lau nhà khô.
Bảo trì định kỳ: Ở những khu vực có mật độ đi lại cao, nên áp dụng
biện pháp xử lý như trên hàng ngày. Không nên đánh bóng và phủ keo.
Để biết thông tin trở giúp y tế khẩn cấp, hãy gọi Ecolab: 001 800 13 203 9987
Tham khảo ý kiến Đại diện Ecolab của bạn để biết hướng dẫn sử dụng cụ thể và thiết bị pha chế được
khuyến nghị. Để biết thông tin về cách cảnh báo và sơ cứu, vui lòng tham khảo Bảng dữ liệu an toàn
(SDS) hoặc nhãn sản phẩm.

en.properties:
Recover Spray Buff has been specially formulated with the polymer to
enhance the appearance of all floor finishes. Designed to remove back
heel marks, scuffs and repairs scratches. It can be used with both low
and high speed floor machines.
en.usage:
1. Remove gross soils by sweeping and/or damp mopping then dust
mop the area.
2. Shake Recover Spray Buff well before use and place into a suitable
trigger spray bottle. Apply 2-3 full sprays to a workable area
(approximately 2 sq.m.). Do not spray heavily.
3. Make one pass over area to spread the product over the floor
surface. Then buff dry, paying special attention to heavily soiled or
worn sections.
4. When pad becomes clogged with soil, turnover to clean side or
replace with a new pad.
5. Dust mop area to remove loose soils.
For emergency medical information call Ecolab: 001 1 651 222 5352

vi.properties:
Recover Spray Buff được pha chế đặc biệt với polyme giúp nâng cao
chất lượng bề ngoài của tất cả các lớp sàn đã phủ keo. Được dùng để
loại bỏ các dấu đen do gót giày gây ra, vết xước và sửa chữa các vết
xước. Có thể được sử dụng với máy chà sàn tốc độ thấp lẫn tốc độ cao.
vi.usage:
1. Thu gom bụi thô bằng cách quét và/hoặc lau ẩm rồi lau khô toàn bộ
khu vực.
2. Lắc đều Recover Spray Buff trước khi dùng và rót vào bình xịt có
vòi phù hợp. Xịt 2-3 lần vào khu vực cần bảo trì. (khoảng 2m vuông).
KHÔNG xịt quá nhiều.
3. Tán đều dung dịch một lượt lên toàn bộ bề mặt. Sau đó đánh bóng
đến khi khô, cẩn trọng với các vết bẩn cứng đầu hoặc các khu vực
trên sàn bị mòn.
4. Khi miếng pad bị dính bụi bẩn, hãy đổi sang mặt sạch hoặc thay pad
sạch mới.
5. Lau bụi khô khu vực vừa bảo trì để vệ sinh sạch bụi bẩn.
Trong trường hợp khẩn cấp, hãy gọi Ecolab: 001 800 13 203 9987

sản phẩm.

en.usage:
⦁ Select an area of approximately 40 sq ft (4 sq m) for the polishing process.
⦁ Lightly wet the floor, stir Pinnacle™ Marble Polish Paste and place a scoop of product in the center of the area to
be worked.
⦁ Utilizing a red pad, natural fiber pad or Tampico brush work the Pinnacle™ Marble Polish Paste over the area
with a floor machine weighted between 140 and 160 pounds.
⦁ The consistency of the slurry should be fluid enough to ensure even coverage.
⦁ If the slurry becomes too dry, add water as needed.
⦁ Once achieving the desired polish wet vacuum the slurry then, rinse and wet vacuum again.
⦁ Complete large areas in a checkerboard fashion, overlapping sections to blend.
⦁ If the desired result is not obtained, the stone may be too badly worn. Use Pinnacle™ Marble Polish Prep to
smooth the wear patterns before polishing.
Additional Notes:
⦁ Pinnacle™ Marble Polish Paste will have a tendency to settle/separate in storage. Always stir the contents well
prior to use and from time to time during use.
⦁ Replace the bucket lid as soon as possible after use. Ensure that the lid is firmly replaced when stored.
Product is freeze/thaw stable.
Store between 32°F (0°C) and 122°F (50°C).
Product expires 1080 days after its manufacture.
For service or additional information, call 1-800-35-CLEAN (352-5326).
